source.text: 💡 Adopt an innovation…
⚖ Appeal over your liege’s head…
🕸 Begin a plot…
🏠 Better the household…
🏗 Raise a building…
💰 Buy out a weak neighbor…
⛓ Buy your freedom
🏡 Buy a manor
⚑ Declare independence…
⚔ Declare war…
💰 Demand extraordinary taxes
🕯 Give alms
🏘 Go into town…
🎁 Grant land…
⚔ Hire a mercenary company
⚖ Hold court
🍗 Hold a feast
🤝 Mediate a quarrel
🚩 Muster the host
🙇 Pay homage…
📜 Petition for a barony
🤝 Petition for a neighbor’s fief…
👑 Petition the liege for title
🏹 Poach the lord’s game
💒 Propose marriage
📜 Revoke a county…
🗡 Scheme against {rival}
🕊 Seek a blessing
💍 Seek a match
🕊 Send an envoy…
🌱 Settle the wasteland…
💰 Squeeze the taxes
🤝 Swear fealty…
🔗 Swear brotherhood with {friend}

ailment.broken_bone.desc.default.context: ailment broken_bone, desc, faith branch default.

ailment.bruises.desc.default.context: ailment bruises, desc, faith branch default.

ailment.bruises.name.default.context: ailment bruises, name, faith branch default.

ailment.cracked_ribs.desc.default.context: ailment cracked_ribs, desc, faith branch default.

ailment.cracked_ribs.name.default.context: ailment cracked_ribs, name, faith branch default.

source.text: Cracked ribs

ailment.festering_wound.desc.default.context: ailment festering_wound, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: It weeps and stinks. The leech shakes his head.

ailment.festering_wound.name.default.context: ailment festering_wound, name, faith branch default.

source.text: A festering wound

ailment.fever.desc.default.context: ailment fever, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: Hot as a forge one hour, ice the next.

ailment.fever.name.default.context: ailment fever, name, faith branch default.

source.text: A burning fever

ailment.flux.desc.default.context: ailment flux, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: The belly rebels and will not be reasoned with.

ailment.flux.name.default.context: ailment flux, name, faith branch default.

source.text: The flux

ailment.gash.desc.default.context: ailment gash, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: Bled fierce and long before it closed.

ailment.gash.name.default.context: ailment gash, name, faith branch default.

source.text: A deep gash

ailment.head_wound.desc.default.context: ailment head_wound, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: The world still rings and tilts.

ailment.head_wound.name.default.context: ailment head_wound, name, faith branch default.

source.text: A cracked pate

ailment.pestilence.desc.default.context: ailment pestilence, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: The great mortality walks, and it stopped here.

ailment.pestilence.name.default.context: ailment pestilence, name, faith branch default.

source.text: Pestilence

ailment.winter_chill.desc.default.context: ailment winter_chill, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: A wet cough that settles deep in the chest.

ailment.winter_chill.name.default.context: ailment winter_chill, name, faith branch default.

source.text: A chilling cough

building.bridge.desc.default.context: building bridge, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: Trade crosses where the ford once drowned it.

building.bridge.name.default.context: building bridge, name, faith branch default.

source.text: Stone Bridge

building.granary.desc.default.context: building granary, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: Grain laid up against the hungry years.

building.granary.name.default.context: building granary, name, faith branch default.

source.text: Granary

building.harbor.desc.default.context: building harbor, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: Every tide brings someone who owes you a toll.

building.harbor.name.default.context: building harbor, name, faith branch default.

source.text: Harbor

building.keep.desc.default.context: building keep, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: The last argument of a lord — and the first thing raiders see.

building.keep.name.default.context: building keep, name, faith branch default.

source.text: Stone Keep

building.library.desc.default.context: building library, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: Shelves of knowledge — and the men who argue over it. (+1 scholarship per season)

building.library.name.default.context: building library, name, faith branch default.

source.text: Library

building.library.name.muslim.context: building library, name, faith branch muslim.

source.text: House of Wisdom

building.market.desc.default.context: building market, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: Tolls, stalls, and strangers’ silver.

building.market.name.default.context: building market, name, faith branch default.

source.text: Market Square

building.mill.desc.default.context: building mill, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: Grinds the valley’s grain for a fee.

building.mill.name.default.context: building mill, name, faith branch default.

source.text: Watermill

building.temple.desc.default.context: building temple, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: Stone raised toward heaven — and remembered on earth.

building.temple.name.default.context: building temple, name, faith branch default.

source.text: Great {temple}

building.walls.desc.default.context: building walls, desc, faith branch default.

source.text: A wall pays its mason once and its lord forever. (stronger when defending)

building.walls.name.default.context: building walls, name, faith branch default.

source.text: Stone Walls

event.after_reapers.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event after_reapers, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Mercy costs a handful of stalks.

event.after_reapers.options.0.label.defa.context: Event after_reapers, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Let them glean in peace.

event.after_reapers.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event after_reapers, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Wages for hunger — labor that may pay double.

event.after_reapers.options.1.failure.te.context: Event after_reapers, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Rain comes before the last sheaf is beaten. At least the household ate.

event.after_reapers.options.1.label.defa.context: Event after_reapers, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Hire them to thresh. (2 gold)

event.after_reapers.options.1.success.te.context: Event after_reapers, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Their labor saves more grain than their wages cost.

event.after_reapers.options.2.desc.defau.context: Event after_reapers, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: What the tree gives freely costs you little.

event.after_reapers.options.2.label.defa.context: Event after_reapers, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Share fruit from the orchard instead.

event.after_reapers.options.3.desc.defau.context: Event after_reapers, authored option 3, desc, branch default.

source.text: Full barns, thin neighbors, long memories.

event.after_reapers.options.3.label.defa.context: Event after_reapers, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Keep every stalk.

event.after_reapers.text.default.context: Event after_reapers, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A poor household moves through the stubble, gathering fallen stalks before everyone agrees the harvest is finished. There is little grain in their sack, but less in their house.

event.after_reapers.title.default.context: Event after_reapers, title, faith branch default.

source.text: After the Reapers

event.annulment_plea.options.0.desc.defa.context: Event annulment_plea, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: 15 gold and 20 piety ride on the church’s judgment.

event.annulment_plea.options.0.failure.t.context: Event annulment_plea, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The church finds the marriage sound — and your motives less so. The plea is refused; the donation is kept, and {spouse} learns what you tried.

event.annulment_plea.options.0.label.def.context: Event annulment_plea, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Press the plea.

event.annulment_plea.options.0.success.e.context: Durable event log for annulment_plea, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: The church annulled the marriage.

event.annulment_plea.options.0.success.t.context: Event annulment_plea, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The judgment comes down: null and void from the first day. {spouse} returns to their kin, and you stand free before {god}.

event.annulment_plea.options.1.desc.defa.context: Event annulment_plea, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Let sleeping vows lie.

event.annulment_plea.options.1.effects.l.context: Durable event log for annulment_plea, authored option 1, effects.

source.text: Thought better of an annulment plea.

event.annulment_plea.options.1.label.def.context: Event annulment_plea, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Withdraw the plea.

event.annulment_plea.text.default.context: Event annulment_plea, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You lay your case before the church: some closeness of blood overlooked, some defect in the vows. The marriage to {spouse}, you argue, never truly was. Learned men stroke their beards; a donation changes hands.

event.annulment_plea.title.default.context: Event annulment_plea, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Flaw in the Vows

event.apprentice_trouble.options.0.desc..context: Event apprentice_trouble, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Slow teaching, well learned.

event.apprentice_trouble.options.0.label.context: Event apprentice_trouble, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Make him redo it beside you.

event.apprentice_trouble.options.1.desc..context: Event apprentice_trouble, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Quick justice; the street will not love it.

event.apprentice_trouble.options.1.label.context: Event apprentice_trouble, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Take it out of his hide.

event.apprentice_trouble.options.2.desc..context: Event apprentice_trouble, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Mercy costs a little coin and buys goodwill.

event.apprentice_trouble.options.2.label.context: Event apprentice_trouble, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: “I broke worse at your age.”

event.apprentice_trouble.text.default.context: Event apprentice_trouble, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A week of work lies in pieces on the floor, and your apprentice stands over it, white as chalk.

event.apprentice_trouble.title.default.context: Event apprentice_trouble, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Apprentice’s Mistake

event.artifact_found.options.0.desc.defa.context: Event artifact_found, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: The earth gives up its secrets rarely.

event.artifact_found.options.0.label.def.context: Event artifact_found, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Keep it.

event.artifact_found.options.1.desc.defa.context: Event artifact_found, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Old things belong to {god}, and the {holy} will remember.

event.artifact_found.options.1.label.def.context: Event artifact_found, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Give it to the {temple}.

event.artifact_found.options.2.desc.defa.context: Event artifact_found, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Clay-caked wonders still fetch bright coin.

event.artifact_found.options.2.label.def.context: Event artifact_found, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Sell it quietly.

event.artifact_found.text.default.context: Event artifact_found, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A plough-share catches; a spade follows. Out of the earth comes a thing of the old times, caked in clay and glinting beneath.

event.artifact_found.title.default.context: Event artifact_found, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Out of the Earth

event.assassin_caught.options.0.desc.def.context: Event assassin_caught, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Let the crowd watch the law work.

event.assassin_caught.options.0.label.de.context: Event assassin_caught, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Justice, publicly.

event.assassin_caught.options.1.desc.def.context: Event assassin_caught, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A quiet death answers a quiet death.

event.assassin_caught.options.1.effects..context: Durable event log for assassin_caught, authored option 1, effects.

source.text: Repaid an assassin in kind.

event.assassin_caught.options.1.label.de.context: Event assassin_caught, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Turn the blade back on its buyer.

event.assassin_caught.options.2.desc.def.context: Event assassin_caught, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Spare the tool to shame the hand.

event.assassin_caught.options.2.label.de.context: Event assassin_caught, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Mercy — and a message.

event.assassin_caught.text.default.context: Event assassin_caught, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The assassin hangs in your dungeon. Under hard questioning, a name is finally spat out — a rival hand paid for your death.

event.assassin_caught.title.default.context: Event assassin_caught, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Question

event.assassin_night.options.0.desc.defa.context: Event assassin_night, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Grapple the blade and hope the dark is kind.

event.assassin_night.options.0.failure.e.context: Durable event log for assassin_night, authored option 0, failure.effects.

source.text: Wounded by an assassin.

event.assassin_night.options.0.failure.t.context: Event assassin_night, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Steel bites before help comes. You survive — barely.

event.assassin_night.options.0.label.def.context: Event assassin_night, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Fight for your life.

event.assassin_night.options.0.success.e.context: Durable event log for assassin_night, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Survived an assassin!

event.assassin_night.options.0.success.t.context: Event assassin_night, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: You wrestle the blade away and pin the assassin, roaring for guards.

event.assassin_night.options.1.desc.defa.context: Event assassin_night, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Distance first, questions later.

event.assassin_night.options.1.failure.t.context: Event assassin_night, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The knife finds you as you scramble.

event.assassin_night.options.1.label.def.context: Event assassin_night, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Roll away and shout for the guard.

event.assassin_night.options.1.success.t.context: Event assassin_night, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Guards burst in; the assassin dives through the window into the night.

event.assassin_night.text.default.context: Event assassin_night, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You wake to a floorboard’s groan. A shadow crosses your chamber — and moonlight finds the knife.

event.assassin_night.title.default.context: Event assassin_night, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Step on the Stair

event.bad_silver.options.0.desc.default.context: Event bad_silver, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Catch the lie before it leaves your palm.

event.bad_silver.options.0.failure.text..context: Event bad_silver, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your test proves nothing. By the time another man spots the clipping, the seller is gone.

event.bad_silver.options.0.label.default.context: Event bad_silver, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Weigh and test them.

event.bad_silver.options.0.success.text..context: Event bad_silver, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The balance reveals the fraud before the seller leaves.

event.bad_silver.options.1.desc.default.context: Event bad_silver, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Strange letters may mean honest foreign coin.

event.bad_silver.options.1.failure.text..context: Event bad_silver, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The worn letters offer no answer.

event.bad_silver.options.1.label.default.context: Event bad_silver, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Read the mint and ruler on the face.

event.bad_silver.options.1.success.text..context: Event bad_silver, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Foreign, not false — and worth slightly more than either of you knew.

event.bad_silver.options.2.desc.default.context: Event bad_silver, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Bad coin travels fast — and so do reputations.

event.bad_silver.options.2.failure.text..context: Event bad_silver, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The market catches the trick and remembers your face.

event.bad_silver.options.2.label.default.context: Event bad_silver, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Pass them to the next fool.

event.bad_silver.options.2.success.text..context: Event bad_silver, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: The bad silver leaves your purse and becomes another household’s lesson.

event.bad_silver.options.3.desc.default.context: Event bad_silver, authored option 3, desc, branch default.

source.text: Take the loss; keep the lord’s good regard.

event.bad_silver.options.3.label.default.context: Event bad_silver, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Surrender them to the lord’s officer.

event.bad_silver.text.default.context: Event bad_silver, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Two coins in your payment are thin at the edge and wrong in the color. They may be foreign, clipped, or simply made by a liar.

event.bad_silver.title.default.context: Event bad_silver, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Bad Silver

event.bad_tooth.options.0.desc.default.context: Event bad_tooth, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Short pain, then peace — for a coin.

event.bad_tooth.options.0.effects.log.de.context: Durable event log for bad_tooth, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Lost a tooth to the smith’s pliers.

event.bad_tooth.options.0.label.default.context: Event bad_tooth, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Have it pulled.

event.bad_tooth.options.1.desc.default.context: Event bad_tooth, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Pain dulls with time. So they say.

event.bad_tooth.options.1.label.default.context: Event bad_tooth, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Endure it.

event.bad_tooth.text.default.context: Event bad_tooth, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A tooth throbs like a war-drum. The smith owns the only pliers in the village.

event.bad_tooth.title.default.context: Event bad_tooth, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Rotten Tooth

event.bandits_village.options.0.desc.def.context: Event bandits_village, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Pitchforks against knives — courage against hard men.

event.bandits_village.options.0.failure..context: Event bandits_village, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: They are harder men than farmers. You carry home a wound.

event.bandits_village.options.0.label.de.context: Event bandits_village, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Rouse the village to drive them out.

event.bandits_village.options.0.success..context: Durable event log for bandits_village, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Drove bandits from {province}.

event.bandits_village.options.0.success..context: Event bandits_village, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Pitchforks and fury. The bandits scatter, leaving loot behind.

event.bandits_village.options.1.desc.def.context: Event bandits_village, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: The lord’s protection, at a small reminder of its price.

event.bandits_village.options.1.label.de.context: Event bandits_village, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Send to {lord} for soldiers.

event.bandits_village.options.2.desc.def.context: Event bandits_village, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Buy quiet, and hope quiet stays bought.

event.bandits_village.options.2.label.de.context: Event bandits_village, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay them to move on.

event.bandits_village.text.default.context: Event bandits_village, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Masterless men have made camp in the wood — deserters and debtors with knives. Now a shepherd lies dead, and folk bar their doors.

event.bandits_village.title.default.context: Event bandits_village, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Riders on the Road

event.become_merchant.options.0.desc.def.context: Event become_merchant, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Trade the workbench for the open road.

event.become_merchant.options.0.effects..context: Durable event log for become_merchant, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Became a merchant.

event.become_merchant.options.0.label.de.context: Event become_merchant, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Take up the merchant’s life.

event.become_merchant.options.1.desc.def.context: Event become_merchant, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: The honest work you know, and nothing more.

event.become_merchant.options.1.label.de.context: Event become_merchant, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Stay true to the craft.

event.become_merchant.text.default.context: Event become_merchant, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You know the roads now, the prices, the men who move goods. Why make one chair when you can sell a hundred?

event.become_merchant.title.default.context: Event become_merchant, title, faith branch default.

source.text: From Bench to Ledger

event.bench_mark.options.0.desc.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Honor the dead, and hope the craft honors you.

event.bench_mark.options.0.failure.text..context: Event bench_mark, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The work is accepted at half price. Loyalty cannot plane a warped board.

event.bench_mark.options.0.label.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Finish it beneath the master’s mark.

event.bench_mark.options.0.success.text..context: Event bench_mark, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The patron pays, and the masters praise a loyalty that did not cheapen the craft.

event.bench_mark.options.1.desc.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Claim the glory — if the guild allows ambition.

event.bench_mark.options.1.failure.text..context: Event bench_mark, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The masters call it presumption and make certain the market hears.

event.bench_mark.options.1.label.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Put your own mark upon it.

event.bench_mark.options.1.success.text..context: Event bench_mark, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: The piece bears your name, and buyers begin asking after it.

event.bench_mark.options.2.desc.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Stand between her and the closed ranks.

event.bench_mark.options.2.failure.text..context: Event bench_mark, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The masters close ranks. Your silver bought only a little time.

event.bench_mark.options.2.label.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Defend the widow’s right to finish the trade.

event.bench_mark.options.2.success.text..context: Event bench_mark, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: The bench remains hers, and your advance returns with grateful thanks.

event.bench_mark.options.3.desc.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 3, desc, branch default.

source.text: Charity asked for is charity halved.

event.bench_mark.options.3.label.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Let the gift stand without argument.

event.bench_mark.options.4.desc.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 4, desc, branch default.

source.text: His own seal against his own word.

event.bench_mark.options.4.failure.text..context: Event bench_mark, authored option 4, failure text, branch default.

source.text: He calls the figures a dead man’s fraud and your demand extortion.

event.bench_mark.options.4.label.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 4, label, branch default.

source.text: Use the ledger to demand the true price.

event.bench_mark.options.4.success.text..context: Event bench_mark, authored option 4, success text, branch default.

source.text: Faced with his own seal and figures, the patron pays what he owes.

event.bench_mark.options.5.desc.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 5, desc, branch default.

source.text: The bench is yours now, for better or worse.

event.bench_mark.options.5.effects.log.d.context: Durable event log for bench_mark, authored option 5, effects.

source.text: Bought a dead master’s tools and obligations.

event.bench_mark.options.5.label.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 5, label, branch default.

source.text: Take the tools you bought.

event.bench_mark.options.6.desc.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 6, desc, branch default.

source.text: Turn surplus iron back into silver.

event.bench_mark.options.6.label.default.context: Event bench_mark, authored option 6, label, branch default.

source.text: Sell the duplicate tools.

event.bench_mark.text.default.context: Event bench_mark, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The patron arrives with guildsmen and sharp eyes. The work, the tools, and the widow’s livelihood will be decided before they leave.

event.bench_mark.title.default.context: Event bench_mark, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Whose Mark Is It?

event.bishops_mitre.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event bishops_mitre, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Two hundred gold buys the seat — and {god}’s raised eyebrow.

event.bishops_mitre.options.0.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for bishops_mitre, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Bought the bishop’s mitre.

event.bishops_mitre.options.0.label.defa.context: Event bishops_mitre, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay the gift.

event.bishops_mitre.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event bishops_mitre, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Merit against money; money usually wins.

event.bishops_mitre.options.1.failure.te.context: Event bishops_mitre, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A richer man in poorer cloth is chosen.

event.bishops_mitre.options.1.label.defa.context: Event bishops_mitre, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Trust to merit alone.

event.bishops_mitre.options.1.success.ef.context: Durable event log for bishops_mitre, authored option 1, success.effects.

source.text: Elevated to bishop!

event.bishops_mitre.options.1.success.te.context: Event bishops_mitre, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Against all cynics, holiness prevails. The mitre is yours.

event.bishops_mitre.options.2.desc.defau.context: Event bishops_mitre, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Keep your hands clean and your seat low.

event.bishops_mitre.options.2.label.defa.context: Event bishops_mitre, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Refuse the game entirely.

event.bishops_mitre.text.default.context: Event bishops_mitre, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The bishop’s seat stands empty, and the metropolitan hints it can be yours — for merit, or for a “gift to the church” of two hundred gold.

event.bishops_mitre.title.default.context: Event bishops_mitre, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Mitre Within Reach

event.border_raid.options.0.desc.default.context: Event border_raid, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Answer smoke with smoke — if your riders are lucky.

event.border_raid.options.0.failure.text.context: Event border_raid, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: An ambush awaits. You lose men and face.

event.border_raid.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event border_raid, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Raid them back, twice as hard.

event.border_raid.options.0.success.effe.context: Durable event log for border_raid, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Repaid a border raid.

event.border_raid.options.0.success.text.context: Event border_raid, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your riders return laden, leaving mirrored smoke on their horizon.

event.border_raid.options.1.desc.default.context: Event border_raid, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Stone and ditch speak quieter than reprisal.

event.border_raid.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event border_raid, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Fortify the border farms.

event.border_raid.options.2.desc.default.context: Event border_raid, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Patience looks much like fear from the border.

event.border_raid.options.2.label.defaul.context: Event border_raid, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Swallow it — this time.

event.border_raid.text.default.context: Event border_raid, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Riders from over the border have burned two of your hamlets and driven off cattle. Your people look to you for an answer.

event.border_raid.title.default.context: Event border_raid, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Smoke on the Border

event.boundary_dispute.options.0.desc.de.context: Event boundary_dispute, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Trust the elders to see straight — if kinship allows.

event.boundary_dispute.options.0.failure.context: Event boundary_dispute, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: His cousin sits on the moot. The stone stays.

event.boundary_dispute.options.0.label.d.context: Event boundary_dispute, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Bring it before the village moot.

event.boundary_dispute.options.0.success.context: Event boundary_dispute, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The elders find for you. The stone walks home.

event.boundary_dispute.options.1.desc.de.context: Event boundary_dispute, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Stones are quietest movers after dark.

event.boundary_dispute.options.1.failure.context: Event boundary_dispute, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Caught in the moonlight, shovel in hand. The moot fines you.

event.boundary_dispute.options.1.label.d.context: Event boundary_dispute, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Move it back by night.

event.boundary_dispute.options.1.success.context: Event boundary_dispute, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: The stone returns as mysteriously as it left.

event.boundary_dispute.options.2.desc.de.context: Event boundary_dispute, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: A strip of land is cheaper than a feud.

event.boundary_dispute.options.2.label.d.context: Event boundary_dispute, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Let it go.

event.boundary_dispute.text.default.context: Event boundary_dispute, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Your neighbor’s plough has crept over the boundary stone — or did the stone itself walk? A strip of your land is suddenly his.

event.boundary_dispute.title.default.context: Event boundary_dispute, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Moved Stone

event.build_opportunity.options.0.desc.d.context: Event build_opportunity, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Your next building costs a quarter less.

event.build_opportunity.options.0.effect.context: Durable event log for build_opportunity, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: A master mason directs the works.

event.build_opportunity.options.0.label..context: Event build_opportunity, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Engage him.

event.build_opportunity.options.1.desc.d.context: Event build_opportunity, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Some roofs leak a while longer.

event.build_opportunity.options.1.label..context: Event build_opportunity, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Send him on his way.

event.build_opportunity.text.default.context: Event build_opportunity, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A wandering master mason, church-trained and road-worn, offers to oversee your works before moving on to richer courts.

event.build_opportunity.text.muslim.context: Event build_opportunity, text, faith branch muslim.

source.text: A wandering master mason, schooled on the great mosques and road-worn, offers to oversee your works before moving on to richer courts.

event.build_opportunity.title.default.context: Event build_opportunity, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Master Builder

event.buy_farm.options.0.desc.default.context: Event buy_farm, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Everything you have, for ground no lord can take.

event.buy_farm.options.0.effects.log.def.context: Durable event log for buy_farm, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Bought a freehold farm.

event.buy_farm.options.0.label.default.context: Event buy_farm, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Buy the land. (120 gold)

event.buy_farm.options.1.desc.default.context: Event buy_farm, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: The strips will wait; fortunes take longer.

event.buy_farm.options.1.label.default.context: Event buy_farm, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Not yet.

event.buy_farm.text.default.context: Event buy_farm, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Old Widow Hedda’s strips lie fallow since her sons died. Her price is fair, and freehold land is the root of every fortune.

event.buy_farm.title.default.context: Event buy_farm, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Land of Your Own

event.camp_fires.options.0.desc.default.context: Event camp_fires, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: The bones care nothing for your purse.

event.camp_fires.options.0.failure.text..context: Event camp_fires, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The bones do not.

event.camp_fires.options.0.label.default.context: Event camp_fires, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Dice with the veterans.

event.camp_fires.options.0.success.text..context: Event camp_fires, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The bones favor you tonight.

event.camp_fires.options.1.desc.default.context: Event camp_fires, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Win a name, or eat the mud.

event.camp_fires.options.1.failure.text..context: Event camp_fires, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You eat mud to great applause.

event.camp_fires.options.1.label.default.context: Event camp_fires, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Wrestle for the camp’s honor.

event.camp_fires.options.1.success.text..context: Event camp_fires, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: You pin a man twice your size while the fires roar approval.

event.camp_fires.options.2.desc.default.context: Event camp_fires, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Old soldiers’ tales are lessons in disguise.

event.camp_fires.options.2.label.default.context: Event camp_fires, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Listen, and learn the old tricks.

event.camp_fires.text.default.context: Event camp_fires, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Armies are mostly waiting. Around the fires the veterans dice, wrestle, and retell battles that grow with every telling.

event.camp_fires.title.default.context: Event camp_fires, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Long Wait

event.camp_forage.options.0.desc.default.context: Event camp_forage, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Their hunger against yours — and yours is armed.

event.camp_forage.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event camp_forage, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Take what the host needs.

event.camp_forage.options.1.desc.default.context: Event camp_forage, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A clear conscience, at market price.

event.camp_forage.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event camp_forage, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay for what you take.

event.camp_forage.options.2.desc.default.context: Event camp_forage, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: An empty belly, but a clean one.

event.camp_forage.options.2.label.defaul.context: Event camp_forage, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: March hungry.

event.camp_forage.text.default.context: Event camp_forage, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The supply wagons are late again, and the host eats the countryside as it goes. A farmstead ahead has full cribs and frightened eyes.

event.camp_forage.title.default.context: Event camp_forage, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Empty Wagons

event.campaign_ends.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event campaign_ends, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: The fields kept, and so did you.

event.campaign_ends.options.0.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for campaign_ends, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Came home from the war.

event.campaign_ends.options.0.label.defa.context: Event campaign_ends, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Home again.

event.campaign_ends.text.default.context: Event campaign_ends, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Peace, or something shaped like it. The host disbands, and the survivors trudge home to their fields, changed.

event.campaign_ends.title.default.context: Event campaign_ends, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The War Lets You Go

event.caravan_venture.options.0.desc.def.context: Event caravan_venture, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A modest stake could double — or vanish with the caravan.

event.caravan_venture.options.0.failure..context: Event caravan_venture, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Raiders took the caravan at a desert well. Your silver is scattered across the sand.

event.caravan_venture.options.0.label.de.context: Event caravan_venture, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Stake 20 gold.

event.caravan_venture.options.0.success..context: Durable event log for caravan_venture, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: A trade venture paid off.

event.caravan_venture.options.0.success..context: Event caravan_venture, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Months later word returns: the venture prospered! Your stake comes back doubled.

event.caravan_venture.options.1.desc.def.context: Event caravan_venture, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A heavier purse rides the same dangerous roads.

event.caravan_venture.options.1.failure..context: Event caravan_venture, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The sea — or the steppe — keeps your fortune. A bitter year.

event.caravan_venture.options.1.label.de.context: Event caravan_venture, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Stake 50 gold.

event.caravan_venture.options.1.success..context: Event caravan_venture, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: The great gamble pays! Profits beyond your hopes.

event.caravan_venture.options.2.desc.def.context: Event caravan_venture, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: No risk, no profit, no stories.

event.caravan_venture.options.2.label.de.context: Event caravan_venture, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Keep your coin at home.

event.caravan_venture.text.default.context: Event caravan_venture, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A caravan is forming for the long route — spice, cloth, and salt. Shares are open to any with silver and a strong stomach for risk.

event.caravan_venture.title.default.context: Event caravan_venture, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Caravan

event.caught_poaching.options.0.desc.def.context: Event caught_poaching, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A bent knee may soften the sentence — or not.

event.caught_poaching.options.0.failure..context: Event caught_poaching, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The lord orders you flogged in the yard as a lesson.

event.caught_poaching.options.0.label.de.context: Event caught_poaching, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Beg for mercy.

event.caught_poaching.options.0.success..context: Event caught_poaching, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The lord waves you off with a fine and a warning.

event.caught_poaching.options.1.desc.def.context: Event caught_poaching, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A bold lie, and a thin one to hang your hand on.

event.caught_poaching.options.1.failure..context: Event caught_poaching, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: No one believes it. The flogging is worse for the insult.

event.caught_poaching.options.1.label.de.context: Event caught_poaching, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Claim the deer was already dead.

event.caught_poaching.options.1.success..context: Event caught_poaching, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Astonishingly, the lie holds.

event.caught_poaching.text.default.context: Event caught_poaching, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The forester marches you before {lord}. Poaching the lord’s game can cost a hand — or worse.

event.caught_poaching.title.default.context: Event caught_poaching, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Caught!

event.chief_qadi.options.0.desc.default.context: Event chief_qadi, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Two hundred gold buys the seat — and {god}’s raised eyebrow.

event.chief_qadi.options.0.effects.log.d.context: Durable event log for chief_qadi, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Bought the chief judgeship.

event.chief_qadi.options.0.label.default.context: Event chief_qadi, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay the gift.

event.chief_qadi.options.1.desc.default.context: Event chief_qadi, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Merit against money; money usually wins.

event.chief_qadi.options.1.failure.text..context: Event chief_qadi, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A richer man with poorer Arabic is chosen.

event.chief_qadi.options.1.label.default.context: Event chief_qadi, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Trust to merit alone.

event.chief_qadi.options.1.success.effec.context: Durable event log for chief_qadi, authored option 1, success.effects.

source.text: Raised to Grand Qadi!

event.chief_qadi.options.1.success.text..context: Event chief_qadi, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Against all cynics, learning prevails. The judgeship is yours.

event.chief_qadi.options.2.desc.default.context: Event chief_qadi, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Keep your hands clean and your seat low.

event.chief_qadi.options.2.label.default.context: Event chief_qadi, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Refuse the game entirely.

event.chief_qadi.text.default.context: Event chief_qadi, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The emir requires a chief judge for the whole province, and hints the appointment can be yours — for merit, or for a “gift to the treasury” of two hundred gold.

event.chief_qadi.title.default.context: Event chief_qadi, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Emir’s Justice

event.child_born_flavor.options.0.desc.d.context: Event child_born_flavor, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Give thanks where thanks are due.

event.child_born_flavor.options.0.label..context: Event child_born_flavor, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: {god} be praised.

event.child_born_flavor.options.1.desc.d.context: Event child_born_flavor, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Joy and hunger arrive together.

event.child_born_flavor.options.1.label..context: Event child_born_flavor, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Another mouth to feed.

event.child_born_flavor.text.default.context: Event child_born_flavor, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The midwife emerges, weary and smiling. {childname} is born — small, loud, and alive. Your line continues.

event.child_born_flavor.title.default.context: Event child_born_flavor, title, faith branch default.

source.text: New Life

event.child_bully.options.0.desc.default.context: Event child_bully, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A bloody nose now, or a toll forever.

event.child_bully.options.0.failure.text.context: Event child_bully, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You lose, thoroughly. But you got up every time, and everyone saw that too.

event.child_bully.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event child_bully, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Fight him.

event.child_bully.options.0.success.text.context: Event child_bully, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: You go down twice and get up three times. He blinks first. No one blocks your lane again.

event.child_bully.options.1.desc.default.context: Event child_bully, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A sharp tongue may cost less than knuckles.

event.child_bully.options.1.failure.text.context: Event child_bully, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Words fail. Mud is involved.

event.child_bully.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event child_bully, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Talk your way past.

event.child_bully.options.1.success.text.context: Event child_bully, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: You make him laugh, and the toll is forgotten.

event.child_bully.options.2.desc.default.context: Event child_bully, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Cowardice, some say. Sense, say your bones.

event.child_bully.options.2.label.defaul.context: Event child_bully, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Go the long way round.

event.child_bully.text.default.context: Event child_bully, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The miller’s son is a head taller than anyone his age and has decided you are today’s sport. The lane is blocked, and the other children are watching.

event.child_bully.title.default.context: Event child_bully, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Big One

event.child_comes_of_age.options.0.desc..context: Event child_comes_of_age, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Callused hands never go hungry for long.

event.child_comes_of_age.options.0.label.context: Event child_comes_of_age, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: The value of hard work.

event.child_comes_of_age.options.1.desc..context: Event child_comes_of_age, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A sharp edge settles many arguments.

event.child_comes_of_age.options.1.label.context: Event child_comes_of_age, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: How to handle a blade.

event.child_comes_of_age.options.2.desc..context: Event child_comes_of_age, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: The quill opens doors the sword cannot.

event.child_comes_of_age.options.2.label.context: Event child_comes_of_age, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Letters and numbers.

event.child_comes_of_age.options.3.desc..context: Event child_comes_of_age, authored option 3, desc, branch default.

source.text: Most battles are won across a table.

event.child_comes_of_age.options.3.label.context: Event child_comes_of_age, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: How to read people.

event.child_comes_of_age.text.default.context: Event child_comes_of_age, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {childname} is sixteen — no longer a child. No tutor shaped their years, so what has your household taught them?

event.child_comes_of_age.title.default.context: Event child_comes_of_age, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Coming of Age

event.child_dare.options.0.desc.default.context: Event child_dare, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Glory above, cold water below.

event.child_dare.options.0.failure.text..context: Event child_dare, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The branch gives early. The water is shallower than it looked.

event.child_dare.options.0.label.default.context: Event child_dare, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Climb. Jump.

event.child_dare.options.0.success.text..context: Event child_dare, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: A heartbeat of flight, a mighty splash, and the other children’s awe.

event.child_dare.options.1.desc.default.context: Event child_dare, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: The willow will keep its dare for braver fools.

event.child_dare.options.1.label.default.context: Event child_dare, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Walk away from it.

event.child_dare.text.default.context: Event child_dare, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The old willow leans far over the millpond, and every child knows the dare: climb to the high branch and jump.

event.child_dare.title.default.context: Event child_dare, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Dare

event.child_educated.options.0.desc.defa.context: Event child_educated, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: The shaping is done; the world awaits.

event.child_educated.options.0.label.def.context: Event child_educated, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: They will do the family proud.

event.child_educated.options.1.desc.defa.context: Event child_educated, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Life teaches what no tutor can.

event.child_educated.options.1.label.def.context: Event child_educated, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Now their true education begins.

event.child_educated.text.default.context: Event child_educated, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {childname} turns sixteen. The years of lessons are over — schooled, drilled, and shaped by your design, a young adult of real promise now stands where the child once fidgeted.

event.child_educated.title.default.context: Event child_educated, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Lessons End

event.child_festival.options.0.desc.defa.context: Event child_festival, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Win or lose, the day is sweet.

event.child_festival.options.0.failure.t.context: Event child_festival, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Third place, a stitch in your side, and a wonderful day anyway.

event.child_festival.options.0.label.def.context: Event child_festival, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Run the race.

event.child_festival.options.0.success.t.context: Event child_festival, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: You cross the line first and are carried about on shoulders.

event.child_festival.options.1.desc.defa.context: Event child_festival, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A sweet prize for a sweet tongue — maybe.

event.child_festival.options.1.failure.t.context: Event child_festival, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The baker has met children before.

event.child_festival.options.1.label.def.context: Event child_festival, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Charm a honey-cake from the baker.

event.child_festival.options.1.success.t.context: Event child_festival, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Warm, sweet, and free. A skill worth keeping.

event.child_festival.text.default.context: Event child_festival, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Festival day, seen from below: a forest of legs, the smell of honey-cakes, and the children’s footrace at noon.

event.child_festival.title.default.context: Event child_festival, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Festival, Waist-High

event.child_fever.options.0.desc.default.context: Event child_fever, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Silver for the best chance a child can have.

event.child_fever.options.0.failure.text.context: Event child_fever, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Coin could not buy what {god} would not give. The child is gone.

event.child_fever.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event child_fever, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay for a physician.

event.child_fever.options.0.success.text.context: Event child_fever, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The fever breaks. The child will live.

event.child_fever.options.1.desc.default.context: Event child_fever, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Put the child in {god}’s hands and keep vigil.

event.child_fever.options.1.failure.text.context: Event child_fever, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: By dawn the little body is still. You dig a small grave.

event.child_fever.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event child_fever, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Pray through the night.

event.child_fever.options.1.success.text.context: Event child_fever, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: By dawn the fever breaks. A small miracle.

event.child_fever.text.default.context: Event child_fever, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Your child {childname} lies shivering, skin like a stove-stone. The old women shake their heads.

event.child_fever.title.default.context: Event child_fever, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Child Burns With Fever

event.child_lessons.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event child_lessons, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Letters learned young are kept for life.

event.child_lessons.options.0.label.defa.context: Event child_lessons, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Trace them until they stay.

event.child_lessons.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event child_lessons, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Sunshine teaches its own lessons.

event.child_lessons.options.1.label.defa.context: Event child_lessons, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Slip away to the fields.

event.child_lessons.text.default.context: Event child_lessons, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The {holy} traces letters in the dust with a stick and looks at you expectantly. Few children are offered even this much.

event.child_lessons.title.default.context: Event child_lessons, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Letters in the Dust

event.child_page.options.0.desc.default.context: Event child_page, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Perfect service is its own recommendation.

event.child_page.options.0.label.default.context: Event child_page, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Serve flawlessly.

event.child_page.options.1.desc.default.context: Event child_page, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Great men’s secrets, if the steward looks away.

event.child_page.options.1.failure.text..context: Event child_page, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Caught lingering behind the arras. The steward’s cuff rings your ear.

event.child_page.options.1.label.default.context: Event child_page, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Listen more than you pour.

event.child_page.options.1.success.text..context: Event child_page, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Great men forget a child has ears. You learn things worth knowing.

event.child_page.text.default.context: Event child_page, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A child of your standing serves at the high table before ruling from behind it: pouring, carrying, and above all listening.

event.child_page.title.default.context: Event child_page, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Page in the Hall

event.child_snares.options.0.desc.defaul.context: Event child_snares, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Patient knots might fill a thin pot.

event.child_snares.options.0.failure.tex.context: Event child_snares, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Empty loops and one angry goose. There is always tomorrow.

event.child_snares.options.0.label.defau.context: Event child_snares, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Set your snares.

event.child_snares.options.0.success.tex.context: Event child_snares, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Two birds and a rabbit. Tonight you are the pride of the table.

event.child_snares.options.1.desc.defaul.context: Event child_snares, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: The birds keep; hunger is patient too.

event.child_snares.options.1.label.defau.context: Event child_snares, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: The hedgerow can wait.

event.child_snares.text.default.context: Event child_snares, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You have watched the older boys set snares along the hedgerow. Your fingers know the knots now, and supper is thin.

event.child_snares.title.default.context: Event child_snares, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Small Hunter

event.child_winter_tales.options.0.desc..context: Event child_winter_tales, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Old tales are lessons wearing cloaks.

event.child_winter_tales.options.0.label.context: Event child_winter_tales, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Remember every word.

event.child_winter_tales.options.1.desc..context: Event child_winter_tales, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Yesterday’s battles teach tomorrow’s.

event.child_winter_tales.options.1.label.context: Event child_winter_tales, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Ask about the old wars.

event.child_winter_tales.options.2.desc..context: Event child_winter_tales, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: A warm sleep is its own small treasure.

event.child_winter_tales.options.2.label.context: Event child_winter_tales, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Fall asleep warm.

event.child_winter_tales.text.default.context: Event child_winter_tales, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Snow seals the doors, and the old ones talk: wars and wonders, debts and dooms, and who really owns the far field.

event.child_winter_tales.title.default.context: Event child_winter_tales, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Tales by the Fire

event.child_wooden_swords.options.0.desc.context: Event child_wooden_swords, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: First to charge is first remembered.

event.child_wooden_swords.options.0.labe.context: Event child_wooden_swords, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Lead it.

event.child_wooden_swords.options.1.desc.context: Event child_wooden_swords, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Battles are won before the charge.

event.child_wooden_swords.options.1.labe.context: Event child_wooden_swords, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Plan the ambush instead.

event.child_wooden_swords.options.2.desc.context: Event child_wooden_swords, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Every army needs someone sensible.

event.child_wooden_swords.options.2.labe.context: Event child_wooden_swords, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Guard the baggage (a basket).

event.child_wooden_swords.text.default.context: Event child_wooden_swords, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The village children divide into two armies with stick-swords and hurdle-shields. Someone must lead the charge.

event.child_wooden_swords.title.default.context: Event child_wooden_swords, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Wooden Swords

event.church_relations.options.0.desc.de.context: Event church_relations, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Dry priests preach kindly of their patrons.

event.church_relations.options.0.label.d.context: Event church_relations, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Fund the roof handsomely.

event.church_relations.options.1.desc.de.context: Event church_relations, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Words cost nothing and are spent as fast.

event.church_relations.options.1.label.d.context: Event church_relations, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Promise prayers instead.

event.church_relations.text.default.context: Event church_relations, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The local {holy} arrives in state, praising your piety at length — and, at greater length, the leaking roof of the great {temple}.

event.church_relations.title.default.context: Event church_relations, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The {holy} Comes Calling

event.comet.options.0.desc.default.context: Event comet, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Let the heavens burn for you.

event.comet.options.0.label.default.context: Event comet, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: An omen of my rise.

event.comet.options.1.desc.default.context: Event comet, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Best to kneel while there is still time.

event.comet.options.1.label.default.context: Event comet, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: A warning to repent.

event.comet.options.2.desc.default.context: Event comet, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Someone in this village has read a book.

event.comet.options.2.label.default.context: Event comet, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: A rock in the sky.

event.comet.text.default.context: Event comet, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A comet drags its burning hair across the night sky. Preachers cry doom; wise women sell charms; everyone looks up.

event.comet.title.default.context: Event comet, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Hairy Star

event.conversion_pressure.options.0.desc.context: Event conversion_pressure, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A new god, an old ambition — the font may open doors.

event.conversion_pressure.options.0.effe.context: Durable event log for conversion_pressure, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Converted to the local faith.

event.conversion_pressure.options.0.labe.context: Event conversion_pressure, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Take their baptism.

event.conversion_pressure.options.1.desc.context: Event conversion_pressure, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: The old gods remember those who remember them.

event.conversion_pressure.options.1.labe.context: Event conversion_pressure, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Keep the old ways.

event.conversion_pressure.text.default.context: Event conversion_pressure, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The missionaries grow bolder, and converts multiply around you. The old gods’ shrines stand quieter each year. To rise here may mean to kneel at their font.

event.conversion_pressure.title.default.context: Event conversion_pressure, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The New Faith

event.corvee.options.0.desc.default.context: Event corvee, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Sweat spent where the powerful can see it.

event.corvee.options.0.effects.log.defau.context: Durable event log for corvee, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Labored on the lord’s works.

event.corvee.options.0.label.default.context: Event corvee, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Work hard and be noticed.

event.corvee.options.1.desc.default.context: Event corvee, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Save your strength — if the reeve’s stick stays elsewhere.

event.corvee.options.1.failure.text.defa.context: Event corvee, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The reeve notices, and his stick argues the point.

event.corvee.options.1.label.default.context: Event corvee, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Do the least you can.

event.corvee.options.1.success.text.defa.context: Event corvee, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: You shirk artfully and save your strength.

event.corvee.options.2.desc.default.context: Event corvee, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: A few coins, and the dawn knock is not for you.

event.corvee.options.2.label.default.context: Event corvee, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Bribe the reeve to overlook you.

event.corvee.text.default.context: Event corvee, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The reeve bangs on doors at dawn: {lord} requires labor — hauling stone, mending the mill-race, digging ditches.

event.corvee.title.default.context: Event corvee, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Lord’s Due

event.county_petition.options.0.desc.def.context: Event county_petition, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A neighbor’s fief hangs on the liege’s mood.

event.county_petition.options.0.failure..context: Event county_petition, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: “You ask much,” the liege says coldly, and turns to other petitioners. The courtiers’ smiles follow you out.

event.county_petition.options.0.label.de.context: Event county_petition, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Press the suit.

event.county_petition.options.0.success..context: Durable event log for county_petition, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Won a neighbor’s fief by petition.

event.county_petition.options.0.success..context: Event county_petition, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The liege’s jaw tightens at the name. “That fief was wasted on him.” The patent is drawn — {cname} is yours, and the court sees exactly whose star is rising.

event.county_petition.text.default.context: Event county_petition, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You kneel before your liege with a recital of the lord of {cname}’s failures — some real, some invented — and humbly suggest the fief would serve the realm better in your hand.

event.county_petition.title.default.context: Event county_petition, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Suit Against a Neighbor

event.court_feast.options.0.desc.default.context: Event court_feast, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: They will talk of this table for years.

event.court_feast.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event court_feast, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Spare no expense.

event.court_feast.options.1.desc.default.context: Event court_feast, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Enough to impress, not enough to beggar.

event.court_feast.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event court_feast, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Generous but shrewd.

event.court_feast.options.2.desc.default.context: Event court_feast, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: A cheap trick — if no tongue catches it.

event.court_feast.options.2.failure.text.context: Event court_feast, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Everyone notices. “The Watered Cup,” they toast, snickering.

event.court_feast.options.2.label.defaul.context: Event court_feast, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Water the wine.

event.court_feast.options.2.success.text.context: Event court_feast, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: No one notices. Profitably done.

event.court_feast.options.3.desc.default.context: Event court_feast, authored option 3, desc, branch default.

source.text: Sweetened water, if no one tastes the difference.

event.court_feast.options.3.failure.text.context: Event court_feast, authored option 3, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Everyone notices. “The Watered Cup,” they murmur, snickering.

event.court_feast.options.3.label.defaul.context: Event court_feast, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Thin the sherbet.

event.court_feast.options.3.success.text.context: Event court_feast, authored option 3, success text, branch default.

source.text: No one notices. Profitably done.

event.court_feast.text.default.context: Event court_feast, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Your hall blazes with candles. Neighbors, vassals, and rivals eat your meat and drink your mead — and measure you all the while.

event.court_feast.text.muslim.context: Event court_feast, text, faith branch muslim.

source.text: Your hall blazes with lamps. Neighbors, vassals, and rivals eat your meat and drink your chilled sherbet — and measure you all the while.

event.court_feast.title.default.context: Event court_feast, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Feast to Remember

event.courting_above.options.0.desc.defa.context: Event courting_above, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Keep calling, keep smiling.

event.courting_above.options.0.label.def.context: Event courting_above, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Let love be stubborn.

event.courting_above.options.1.desc.defa.context: Event courting_above, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Gifts open doors that love alone cannot.

event.courting_above.options.1.label.def.context: Event courting_above, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Win the household with gifts.

event.courting_above.options.2.desc.defa.context: Event courting_above, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Some heights are not worth the climb.

event.courting_above.options.2.effects.l.context: Durable event log for courting_above, authored option 2, effects.

source.text: Gave up an ambitious courtship.

event.courting_above.options.2.label.def.context: Event courting_above, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: They are right. End it.

event.courting_above.text.default.context: Event courting_above, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The kin of {suitor} have taken your measure, and their looks are cold. Fine words at the gate, and behind them the plain question: what business has a {title} with their house?

event.courting_above.title.default.context: Event courting_above, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Door Half-Shut

event.devoted_friend.options.0.desc.defa.context: Event devoted_friend, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Coin and counsel, from the one who means it.

event.devoted_friend.options.0.label.def.context: Event devoted_friend, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Take the gift, and the warning.

event.devoted_friend.options.1.desc.defa.context: Event devoted_friend, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Pride keeps the ledger clean between friends.

event.devoted_friend.options.1.label.def.context: Event devoted_friend, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: “I want nothing I cannot repay.”

event.devoted_friend.text.default.context: Event devoted_friend, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {friend} catches you alone at dusk, glancing over a shoulder. “You have enemies, and I hear things. Watch your back — and take this. You would do the same for me.”

event.devoted_friend.title.default.context: Event devoted_friend, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Friend’s Warning

event.df_claim_declared.options.0.desc.d.context: Event df_claim_declared, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A heavy purse buys back a quiet name.

event.df_claim_declared.options.0.effect.context: Durable event log for df_claim_declared, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Bought off a rival’s claim.

event.df_claim_declared.options.0.label..context: Event df_claim_declared, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Settle: gold for a renunciation. (30 gold)

event.df_claim_declared.options.1.desc.d.context: Event df_claim_declared, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Unravel their witnesses before yours unravel.

event.df_claim_declared.options.1.failur.context: Event df_claim_declared, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your agent is caught, and talks. Now the claim has a martyr’s righteousness about it — and backers with spears.

event.df_claim_declared.options.1.label..context: Event df_claim_declared, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Answer with a counter-plot.

event.df_claim_declared.options.1.succes.context: Durable event log for df_claim_declared, authored option 1, success.effects.

source.text: Unraveled a rival’s claim.

event.df_claim_declared.options.1.succes.context: Event df_claim_declared, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Their bought witness recants, loudly, in the wrong company. The claim collapses into laughter.

event.df_claim_declared.options.2.desc.d.context: Event df_claim_declared, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Shouts unanswered start to sound like truth.

event.df_claim_declared.options.2.label..context: Event df_claim_declared, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Let them shout.

event.df_claim_declared.text.default.context: Event df_claim_declared, text, faith branch default.

source.text: It is done openly now: {rival} publishes a claim to everything you hold — a worm-eaten genealogy, a bought witness, and promises to every malcontent in the county, with foreign gold behind all of it. Men begin choosing which side to kneel to.

event.df_claim_declared.title.default.context: Event df_claim_declared, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Claim Declared

event.df_claim_whispers.options.0.desc.d.context: Event df_claim_whispers, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Loyalty, like cattle, can be purchased by the head.

event.df_claim_whispers.options.0.effect.context: Durable event log for df_claim_whispers, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Spent freely to keep the fence-sitters loyal.

event.df_claim_whispers.options.0.label..context: Event df_claim_whispers, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Buy off the waverers. (20 gold)

event.df_claim_whispers.options.1.desc.d.context: Event df_claim_whispers, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Accuse {rival} openly, and hope the court believes.

event.df_claim_whispers.options.1.failur.context: Event df_claim_whispers, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your accusation rings hollow — half the court had already dined at {rival}’s table. They smile, and work faster.

event.df_claim_whispers.options.1.label..context: Event df_claim_whispers, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Unmask the scheme at court.

event.df_claim_whispers.options.1.succes.context: Event df_claim_whispers, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: You name names before the assembled court, and watch {rival}’s friends find urgent business elsewhere.

event.df_claim_whispers.options.2.desc.d.context: Event df_claim_whispers, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Whispers unattended grow into claims.

event.df_claim_whispers.options.2.label..context: Event df_claim_whispers, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay it no mind.

event.df_claim_whispers.text.default.context: Event df_claim_whispers, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {rival} dines your neighbors, remembers their sons’ names, and asks — always lightly — whether the land might not be better served. A spy in their household brings worse: parchments are being drawn up.

event.df_claim_whispers.title.default.context: Event df_claim_whispers, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Rival’s Quiet Work

event.df_conspiracy.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event df_conspiracy, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Terror may find the knife — or blind your friends.

event.df_conspiracy.options.0.failure.te.context: Event df_conspiracy, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You seize the wrong people, and the true conspirators use the fear — half your servants flee, and the rest dare not warn you now.

event.df_conspiracy.options.0.label.defa.context: Event df_conspiracy, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Purge the household.

event.df_conspiracy.options.0.success.ef.context: Durable event log for df_conspiracy, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Purged a murderous conspiracy.

event.df_conspiracy.options.0.success.te.context: Event df_conspiracy, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Three servants taken in the night; one talks. The paid knife flees your hall ahead of the rope, and the silence lifts.
