event.df_conspiracy.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event df_conspiracy, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A season away cools even hot blood.

event.df_conspiracy.options.1.label.defa.context: Event df_conspiracy, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Lie low at a kinsman’s hall. (10 gold)

event.df_conspiracy.options.2.desc.defau.context: Event df_conspiracy, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: The stars have never yet held a shield.

event.df_conspiracy.options.2.label.defa.context: Event df_conspiracy, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Trust your stars.

event.df_conspiracy.text.default.context: Event df_conspiracy, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Your oldest armsman is found in the millrace, drowned in a foot of water — and he could swim. Someone inside your walls is paid. The household eats in silence and watches itself; the net is closing, and you cannot see its ropes.

event.df_conspiracy.title.default.context: Event df_conspiracy, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Conspiracy Ripens

event.df_knife.options.0.desc.default.context: Event df_knife, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Three knives in the dark, and only your own arm.

event.df_knife.options.0.failure.effects.context: Durable event log for df_knife, authored option 0, failure.effects.

source.text: Left for dead; the house was cast down in the night.

event.df_knife.options.0.failure.text.de.context: Event df_knife, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Steel finds you again and again, and the world goes white, then strange. You wake to a physician’s face and impossible news: in the confusion your enemies have taken the seat, the keys, everything but your life.

event.df_knife.options.0.label.default.context: Event df_knife, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Fight for your life.

event.df_knife.options.0.success.effects.context: Durable event log for df_knife, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Survived the great conspiracy.

event.df_knife.options.0.success.text.de.context: Event df_knife, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: You take a blade through the arm and give better than you get — two flee, one dies on the floorboards, and the conspiracy dies with him. You rule from a sickbed for a season, but you rule.

event.df_knife.options.1.desc.default.context: Event df_knife, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Throw yourself on the mercy of {god} — and flee.

event.df_knife.options.1.effects.log.def.context: Durable event log for df_knife, authored option 1, effects.

source.text: Fled into sanctuary; the lands were seized behind you.

event.df_knife.options.1.label.default.context: Event df_knife, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Beg sanctuary of the {temple}.

event.df_knife.text.default.context: Event df_knife, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You wake with a hand over your mouth and steel already moving. There are three of them, and they know the room — someone drew them a map. {god} help you, the guards are not coming.

event.df_knife.title.default.context: Event df_knife, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Knife

event.df_league.options.0.desc.default.context: Event df_league, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Silver unmakes oaths faster than steel.

event.df_league.options.0.effects.log.de.context: Durable event log for df_league, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Bought off a rising against the house.

event.df_league.options.0.label.default.context: Event df_league, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Buy the ringleaders, one by one. (25 gold)

event.df_league.options.1.desc.default.context: Event df_league, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Strike the night-drill before it becomes an army.

event.df_league.options.1.failure.text.d.context: Event df_league, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: They were ready, and your men come home bloody. Now every fence-sitter knows you can be stood against.

event.df_league.options.1.label.default.context: Event df_league, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Cow them before they march.

event.df_league.options.1.success.text.d.context: Event df_league, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your men descend on the night-drill. The league scatters into the dark, leaderless and done.

event.df_league.options.2.desc.default.context: Event df_league, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Words in barns become banners in fields.

event.df_league.options.2.label.default.context: Event df_league, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Barns and talk. Let them meet.

event.df_league.text.default.context: Event df_league, text, faith branch default.

source.text: It is no longer songs. Headmen from a dozen villages meet in barns, and a disgraced captain drills them at night. Your bailiff names it plainly: a league, sworn against your house.

event.df_league.title.default.context: Event df_league, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The League of the Discontent

event.df_murmurs.options.0.desc.default.context: Event df_murmurs, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A full belly sings no rebel songs.

event.df_murmurs.options.0.label.default.context: Event df_murmurs, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Feast and gift the worst parishes. (15 gold)

event.df_murmurs.options.1.desc.default.context: Event df_murmurs, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Patrols may quiet the songs — or give them a martyr.

event.df_murmurs.options.1.failure.text..context: Event df_murmurs, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A patrol is stoned, an armsman killed. Now there is a martyr, and the murmurs have a name to gather around.

event.df_murmurs.options.1.label.default.context: Event df_murmurs, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: A show of force on the roads.

event.df_murmurs.options.1.success.text..context: Event df_murmurs, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Patrols at every ford and fair. The songs quiet — for now.

event.df_murmurs.options.2.desc.default.context: Event df_murmurs, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Neglect is a slow road downhill.

event.df_murmurs.options.2.label.default.context: Event df_murmurs, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: They will tire of it.

event.df_murmurs.text.default.context: Event df_murmurs, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The reeves report it carefully, eyes down: the villages are sullen, the tax carts need armed escorts, and an old song about kinder lords is sung again in the taverns of {province}.

event.df_murmurs.title.default.context: Event df_murmurs, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Murmurs in the Villages

event.df_omen.options.0.desc.default.context: Event df_omen, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Watched doors sleep better at night.

event.df_omen.options.0.label.default.context: Event df_omen, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Double the guard, reward the loyal. (15 gold)

event.df_omen.options.1.desc.default.context: Event df_omen, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Catch the poisoner — or teach him your defenses.

event.df_omen.options.1.failure.text.def.context: Event df_omen, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your trap catches a scullion — innocent, probably. The real agent reports your defenses in detail.

event.df_omen.options.1.label.default.context: Event df_omen, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Set a trap for their agent.

event.df_omen.options.1.success.text.def.context: Event df_omen, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: The poisoner walks into it, and under questioning gives up a name. The knives stop — and {rival} knows that you know.

event.df_omen.options.2.desc.default.context: Event df_omen, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Dead dogs do not cut their own throats.

event.df_omen.options.2.label.default.context: Event df_omen, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Omens are for old women.

event.df_omen.text.default.context: Event df_omen, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A dead dog at your threshold, its throat cut. A serving girl who knew your habits, gone in the night. Your spymaster — you pay him well — says the pattern points one way: {rival} is done waiting for you to die naturally.

event.df_omen.title.default.context: Event df_omen, title, faith branch default.

source.text: An Omen of Knives

event.df_revolt.options.0.desc.default.context: Event df_revolt, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Everything you hold rides on one field.

event.df_revolt.options.0.failure.effect.context: Durable event log for df_revolt, authored option 0, failure.effects.

source.text: Cast down by a rising of the commons.

event.df_revolt.options.0.failure.text.d.context: Event df_revolt, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your line breaks — and when it breaks, everything breaks. You ride from the field with a dozen men and the clothes you stand in.

event.df_revolt.options.0.label.default.context: Event df_revolt, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Fight for your seat.

event.df_revolt.options.0.success.effect.context: Durable event log for df_revolt, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Crushed the great rising of the commons.

event.df_revolt.options.0.success.text.d.context: Event df_revolt, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Their harvest-king falls in the first press and the host melts back to its plows. You are merciless in victory, and no one sings that song again.

event.df_revolt.options.1.desc.default.context: Event df_revolt, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Yield the lands and flee abroad with what you can carry.

event.df_revolt.options.1.effects.log.de.context: Durable event log for df_revolt, authored option 1, effects.

source.text: Fled a rising of the commons.

event.df_revolt.options.1.label.default.context: Event df_revolt, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Abdicate and slip away.

event.df_revolt.options.2.desc.default.context: Event df_revolt, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: His swords end it — and his price follows.

event.df_revolt.options.2.effects.log.de.context: Durable event log for df_revolt, authored option 2, effects.

source.text: The liege’s host put down the rising — at a price.

event.df_revolt.options.2.label.default.context: Event df_revolt, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Beg your liege’s aid. (20 gold)

event.df_revolt.text.default.context: Event df_revolt, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Fire in the night, from one end of your lands to the other. The league marches under a harvest-king of its own making, and your garrisons yield their towers rather than fight their neighbors. This is no riot — it is a war for your seat.

event.df_revolt.title.default.context: Event df_revolt, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Realm Rises

event.df_usurp.options.0.desc.default.context: Event df_usurp, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: One battle decides whose name the gate bears.

event.df_usurp.options.0.failure.effects.context: Durable event log for df_usurp, authored option 0, failure.effects.

source.text: Overthrown by a rival claimant.

event.df_usurp.options.0.failure.text.de.context: Event df_usurp, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your men would not stand — some would not even draw. You watch your own banner come down from the gate tower.

event.df_usurp.options.0.label.default.context: Event df_usurp, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Meet them in the field.

event.df_usurp.options.0.success.effects.context: Durable event log for df_usurp, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Destroyed a pretender in open war.

event.df_usurp.options.0.success.text.de.context: Event df_usurp, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The pretender’s host breaks like rotten wood, and the pretender hangs from the gate they would have entered in triumph.

event.df_usurp.options.1.desc.default.context: Event df_usurp, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Surrender the lands for your lives and your strongboxes.

event.df_usurp.options.1.effects.log.def.context: Durable event log for df_usurp, authored option 1, effects.

source.text: Yielded everything to a rival claimant.

event.df_usurp.options.1.label.default.context: Event df_usurp, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Yield and beg terms.

event.df_usurp.text.default.context: Event df_usurp, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {rival} has raised a banner, and half the countryside flocks to it — the malcontents, the bought, the bored. Riders in your own colors are seen changing cloaks at the crossroads. There is no more law in this, only spears — or surrender.

event.df_usurp.title.default.context: Event df_usurp, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Usurper’s Banners

event.doubt.options.0.desc.default.context: Event doubt, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Kneel until the kneeling feels true again.

event.doubt.options.0.label.default.context: Event doubt, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Faith answers doubt.

event.doubt.options.1.desc.default.context: Event doubt, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Live as though the sky is empty.

event.doubt.options.1.label.default.context: Event doubt, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Perhaps no one is watching.

event.doubt.options.2.desc.default.context: Event doubt, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Some questions keep until morning.

event.doubt.options.2.label.default.context: Event doubt, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Sleep takes you before an answer comes.

event.doubt.text.default.context: Event doubt, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Lying awake, you wonder: does {god} see you at all? Has any of it mattered?

event.doubt.title.default.context: Event doubt, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Dark Night of the Soul

event.drink_trouble.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event drink_trouble, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Glory or a ditch — the ale decides.

event.drink_trouble.options.0.failure.te.context: Event drink_trouble, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You wake in a ditch, short a pouch and long a black eye.

event.drink_trouble.options.0.label.defa.context: Event drink_trouble, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Wade in swinging.

event.drink_trouble.options.0.success.te.context: Event drink_trouble, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: You crack heads and emerge grinning, a small legend by morning.

event.drink_trouble.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event drink_trouble, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: No songs are sung about the man who left early.

event.drink_trouble.options.1.label.defa.context: Event drink_trouble, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Slip out the back.

event.drink_trouble.options.2.desc.defau.context: Event drink_trouble, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: A cool tongue could spare many teeth — including yours.

event.drink_trouble.options.2.failure.te.context: Event drink_trouble, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A stray fist finds you anyway.

event.drink_trouble.options.2.label.defa.context: Event drink_trouble, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Talk them all down.

event.drink_trouble.options.2.success.te.context: Event drink_trouble, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: Somehow, you turn rage to laughter. Men remember it.

event.drink_trouble.text.default.context: Event drink_trouble, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The feast-ale flows, songs get louder, and someone insults someone’s mother. Fists are already rising.

event.drink_trouble.title.default.context: Event drink_trouble, title, faith branch default.

source.text: One Cup Too Many

event.famine_relief.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event famine_relief, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Full barns were built for days like this.

event.famine_relief.options.0.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for famine_relief, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: The granary fed {province} through the famine.

event.famine_relief.options.0.label.defa.context: Event famine_relief, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Open the granary reserves.

event.famine_relief.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event famine_relief, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Bread bought dear is loyalty bought cheap.

event.famine_relief.options.1.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for famine_relief, authored option 1, effects.

source.text: Fed the hungry in famine.

event.famine_relief.options.1.label.defa.context: Event famine_relief, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Buy grain to give out. (20 gold)

event.famine_relief.options.2.desc.defau.context: Event famine_relief, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Hunger pays well, and remembers longer.

event.famine_relief.options.2.label.defa.context: Event famine_relief, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Sell grain at famine prices.

event.famine_relief.options.3.desc.defau.context: Event famine_relief, authored option 3, desc, branch default.

source.text: Spears on the granary door say enough.

event.famine_relief.options.3.label.defa.context: Event famine_relief, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Guard the stores and wait.

event.famine_relief.text.default.context: Event famine_relief, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The harvest failed across {province}, and now the roads fill with hollow-eyed families drifting toward your keep.

event.famine_relief.title.default.context: Event famine_relief, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Empty Granaries

event.feud_gentry.options.0.desc.default.context: Event feud_gentry, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Honor by steel — win loud or bleed quiet.

event.feud_gentry.options.0.failure.text.context: Event feud_gentry, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Their blade is quicker. You yield, bleeding.

event.feud_gentry.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event feud_gentry, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Demand a duel.

event.feud_gentry.options.0.success.effe.context: Durable event log for feud_gentry, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Won a duel of honor.

event.feud_gentry.options.0.success.text.context: Event feud_gentry, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Steel rings; your point finds their shoulder. Honor is satisfied, loudly.

event.feud_gentry.options.1.desc.default.context: Event feud_gentry, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Debts and rumors cut deeper, if the knife stays hidden.

event.feud_gentry.options.1.failure.text.context: Event feud_gentry, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your scheming is uncovered and named for what it is.

event.feud_gentry.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event feud_gentry, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Ruin them quietly instead.

event.feud_gentry.options.1.success.text.context: Event feud_gentry, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Debts called, rumors seeded — within a year their fortunes crumble.

event.feud_gentry.options.2.desc.default.context: Event feud_gentry, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Peace bought with a little pride.

event.feud_gentry.options.2.label.defaul.context: Event feud_gentry, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Laugh it off.

event.feud_gentry.text.default.context: Event feud_gentry, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {rival} insults your house before witnesses. Among the gentry, such words are answered with steel or with cunning — never with silence.

event.feud_gentry.title.default.context: Event feud_gentry, title, faith branch default.

source.text: An Affair of Honor

event.field_battle_lost.options.0.desc.d.context: Event field_battle_lost, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Live now; be avenged later.

event.field_battle_lost.options.0.label..context: Event field_battle_lost, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Rally who you can in the dark.

event.field_battle_lost.text.default.context: Event field_battle_lost, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The line bent, then broke at {cname}. You are borne away with the remnant of your host — bloodied, beaten, but breathing.

event.field_battle_lost.title.default.context: Event field_battle_lost, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Battle — the Day Is Lost

event.field_battle_won.options.0.desc.de.context: Event field_battle_won, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Savor it; the crows already do.

event.field_battle_won.options.0.label.d.context: Event field_battle_won, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Tend the wounded, and count the spoils.

event.field_battle_won.text.default.context: Event field_battle_won, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Steel and shouting at {cname} — and when the lines part it is their banner that falls back, their dead that thicken the ground. Your host holds the field.

event.field_battle_won.title.default.context: Event field_battle_won, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Battle — the Field Is Yours

event.first_battle.options.0.desc.defaul.context: Event first_battle, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Glory and scars both wait in the shield-wall.

event.first_battle.options.0.failure.tex.context: Event first_battle, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The line buckles. You take a blade and are dragged from the press, bleeding.

event.first_battle.options.0.label.defau.context: Event first_battle, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Stand in the line.

event.first_battle.options.0.success.eff.context: Durable event log for first_battle, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Survived the shield-wall.

event.first_battle.options.0.success.tex.context: Event first_battle, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The wall holds. The enemy breaks first, and you are alive — alive! — with loot on the field.

event.first_battle.options.1.desc.defaul.context: Event first_battle, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Live quiet, and let men name it.

event.first_battle.options.1.label.defau.context: Event first_battle, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Hang back among the baggage.

event.first_battle.text.default.context: Event first_battle, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Horns. Mud. A line of strangers who mean to kill you, close enough now to see their teeth. The man beside you is praying; the man beyond him is laughing.

event.first_battle.title.default.context: Event first_battle, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Shield-Wall

event.first_muster.options.0.desc.defaul.context: Event first_muster, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Hard drill today keeps you breathing tomorrow.

event.first_muster.options.0.label.defau.context: Event first_muster, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Sweat now, live later.

event.first_muster.options.1.desc.defaul.context: Event first_muster, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Their coin and their stories, if the dice are kind.

event.first_muster.options.1.failure.tex.context: Event first_muster, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: They take your pay and laugh you back to the drill-yard.

event.first_muster.options.1.label.defau.context: Event first_muster, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Dice with the veterans instead.

event.first_muster.options.1.success.tex.context: Event first_muster, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: You win their coin and, better, their stories.

event.first_muster.text.default.context: Event first_muster, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Drill, drill, and drill again. The sergeant’s stick finds every lazy elbow. “Sloppy lines die,” he says. “Neat lines kill.”

event.first_muster.title.default.context: Event first_muster, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Muster Field

event.flee_serfdom.options.0.desc.defaul.context: Event flee_serfdom, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Freedom at the end of the road — or a halter.

event.flee_serfdom.options.0.failure.tex.context: Event flee_serfdom, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The lord’s riders catch you at the ford. You are dragged back in a halter.

event.flee_serfdom.options.0.label.defau.context: Event flee_serfdom, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Run.

event.flee_serfdom.options.0.success.eff.context: Durable event log for flee_serfdom, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Fled serfdom to a new land!

event.flee_serfdom.options.0.success.tex.context: Event flee_serfdom, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Weeks of hedgerows and hunger — but you make it. A new province, a new name, a free life.

event.flee_serfdom.options.1.desc.defaul.context: Event flee_serfdom, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Better the known yoke than the unknown road.

event.flee_serfdom.options.1.label.defau.context: Event flee_serfdom, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Stay. This is home, chains and all.

event.flee_serfdom.text.default.context: Event flee_serfdom, text, faith branch default.

source.text: They say a serf who reaches a town and lives there a year and a day is free. The road is long, the law is against you — but the door stands open tonight.

event.flee_serfdom.title.default.context: Event flee_serfdom, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Open Road

event.ford_in_flood.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Heroism the whole road will remember — if you live.

event.ford_in_flood.options.0.failure.te.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The current hammers you against the cart before others drag everyone clear.

event.ford_in_flood.options.0.label.defa.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Ride or swim out to them.

event.ford_in_flood.options.0.success.te.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: One by one, every hand reaches the bank. The whole road saw who went first.

event.ford_in_flood.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Clever hands may succeed where strong arms drown.

event.ford_in_flood.options.1.failure.te.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The first rope parts and whips your hands raw.

event.ford_in_flood.options.1.label.defa.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Rig a rope and lever from the bank.

event.ford_in_flood.options.1.success.te.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: The cart turns with the rope instead of against it. Wood, beasts, and people come free together.

event.ford_in_flood.options.2.desc.defau.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: A crowd is a rope, if someone holds the end.

event.ford_in_flood.options.2.failure.te.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Everyone shouts a different command until a stronger voice takes over.

event.ford_in_flood.options.2.label.defa.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Put every bystander to work.

event.ford_in_flood.options.2.success.te.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: A frightened crowd becomes a line of hands. Nobody is lost.

event.ford_in_flood.options.3.desc.defau.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 3, desc, branch default.

source.text: Little glory, but no one drowns for your pride.

event.ford_in_flood.options.3.label.defa.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Run for more help.

event.ford_in_flood.options.4.desc.defau.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 4, desc, branch default.

source.text: The river keeps its secrets; so will you.

event.ford_in_flood.options.4.label.defa.context: Event ford_in_flood, authored option 4, label, branch default.

source.text: Keep walking.

event.ford_in_flood.text.default.context: Event ford_in_flood, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Snowmelt has turned the ford brown and violent. A cart has slewed sideways in the current, with a family clinging to it as the water rises.

event.ford_in_flood.title.default.context: Event ford_in_flood, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Ford in Flood

event.foundling.options.0.desc.default.context: Event foundling, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: One more mouth, one more soul at your hearth.

event.foundling.options.0.effects.log.de.context: Durable event log for foundling, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Took in a foundling.

event.foundling.options.0.label.default.context: Event foundling, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Raise it as your own.

event.foundling.options.1.desc.default.context: Event foundling, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Let the house of {god} answer for the child.

event.foundling.options.1.label.default.context: Event foundling, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Carry it to the {temple}.

event.foundling.text.default.context: Event foundling, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A baby, swaddled in rags, left at your doorstep in the night. It looks up at you and does not cry.

event.foundling.title.default.context: Event foundling, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Basket at the Door

event.friday_khutba.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event friday_khutba, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A little grace, and the preacher’s goodwill.

event.friday_khutba.options.0.label.defa.context: Event friday_khutba, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Take it to heart.

event.friday_khutba.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event friday_khutba, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Profit for the mind, frost from the pulpit.

event.friday_khutba.options.1.label.defa.context: Event friday_khutba, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Let your mind wander to business.

event.friday_khutba.text.default.context: Event friday_khutba, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {priest} preaches the Friday khutba with unusual fire — of wealth, its duties, and the scales that weigh every deed.

event.friday_khutba.title.default.context: Event friday_khutba, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Words After Prayer

event.friend_in_need.options.0.desc.defa.context: Event friend_in_need, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A debt forgotten is a friend kept.

event.friend_in_need.options.0.label.def.context: Event friend_in_need, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay it. (5 gold)

event.friend_in_need.options.1.desc.defa.context: Event friend_in_need, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Kind words pay no collectors.

event.friend_in_need.options.1.label.def.context: Event friend_in_need, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Offer sympathy only.

event.friend_in_need.text.default.context: Event friend_in_need, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {friend} comes to you at dusk, shame-faced. A debt is due, and the collector is not a patient man.

event.friend_in_need.title.default.context: Event friend_in_need, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Friend in Need

event.friend_vouch.options.0.desc.defaul.context: Event friend_vouch, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Your good name, wagered on theirs.

event.friend_vouch.options.0.failure.tex.context: Event friend_vouch, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The measures prove short. Your word carries less than it did yesterday.

event.friend_vouch.options.0.label.defau.context: Event friend_vouch, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Swear to their honesty.

event.friend_vouch.options.0.success.tex.context: Event friend_vouch, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your word carries. The charge is dropped, and {friend} will not forget it.

event.friend_vouch.options.1.desc.defaul.context: Event friend_vouch, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Their trouble, their verdict.

event.friend_vouch.options.1.label.defau.context: Event friend_vouch, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Stay out of it.

event.friend_vouch.text.default.context: Event friend_vouch, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {friend} stands before the manor court accused of short-measuring grain. One respected voice swearing to their honesty could settle it — and they are looking at you.

event.friend_vouch.title.default.context: Event friend_vouch, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Standing Surety

event.gentry_feuding_neighbors.options.0.context: Event gentry_feuding_neighbors, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Both houses could owe you — or hate you together.

event.gentry_feuding_neighbors.options.0.context: Event gentry_feuding_neighbors, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The feud finds a second wind — with your name tangled in it.

event.gentry_feuding_neighbors.options.0.context: Event gentry_feuding_neighbors, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Broker a peace between them.

event.gentry_feuding_neighbors.options.0.context: Event gentry_feuding_neighbors, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Hard words soften across your table. Both houses owe you now.

event.gentry_feuding_neighbors.options.1.context: Event gentry_feuding_neighbors, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Safe favor with the likely winner.

event.gentry_feuding_neighbors.options.1.context: Event gentry_feuding_neighbors, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Back the stronger house.

event.gentry_feuding_neighbors.options.2.context: Event gentry_feuding_neighbors, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Their feud, their funerals.

event.gentry_feuding_neighbors.options.2.context: Event gentry_feuding_neighbors, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Keep clear of it.

event.gentry_feuding_neighbors.text.defa.context: Event gentry_feuding_neighbors, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Two neighboring houses have fallen out over a mill-race, and both send riders to your hall the same afternoon, seeking your name for their cause.

event.gentry_feuding_neighbors.title.def.context: Event gentry_feuding_neighbors, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Feud on Your Doorstep

event.good_omen.options.0.desc.default.context: Event good_omen, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Take the sign and carry it lightly.

event.good_omen.options.0.label.default.context: Event good_omen, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Great things, then.

event.good_omen.text.default.context: Event good_omen, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A white hart crosses your path at dawn and pauses, regarding you. The old folk say such beasts mark men for great things.

event.good_omen.title.default.context: Event good_omen, title, faith branch default.

source.text: An Omen

event.good_ox_year.options.0.desc.defaul.context: Event good_ox_year, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Let the plough do the boasting.

event.good_ox_year.options.0.label.defau.context: Event good_ox_year, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: The beast earns its hay.

event.good_ox_year.text.default.context: Event good_ox_year, text, faith branch default.

source.text: With the ox pulling, you plough deeper and faster than any neighbor. The extra furlongs pay.

event.good_ox_year.title.default.context: Event good_ox_year, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Strong Team

event.grant_of_barony.options.0.desc.def.context: Event grant_of_barony, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A tower, a banner, and a lord above you.

event.grant_of_barony.options.0.effects..context: Durable event log for grant_of_barony, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Granted a barony — a lord at last!

event.grant_of_barony.options.0.label.de.context: Event grant_of_barony, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Kneel and swear.

event.grant_of_barony.options.1.desc.def.context: Event grant_of_barony, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A fat purse, and a colder look from {lord}.

event.grant_of_barony.options.1.label.de.context: Event grant_of_barony, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Ask instead for gold.

event.grant_of_barony.text.default.context: Event grant_of_barony, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {lord} summons you before the hall. “You have served beyond any debt. The vacant lands and tower shall be yours — swear to me, and hold them as my sworn baron.”

event.grant_of_barony.title.default.context: Event grant_of_barony, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Banner of Your Own

event.guild_entry.options.0.desc.default.context: Event guild_entry, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Silver buys a name the craft will honor.

event.guild_entry.options.0.effects.log..context: Durable event log for guild_entry, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Joined the craft guild.

event.guild_entry.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event guild_entry, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay the entry fee. (15 gold)

event.guild_entry.options.1.desc.default.context: Event guild_entry, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Freedom, and no friends at the bench.

event.guild_entry.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event guild_entry, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Work outside the guild.

event.guild_entry.text.default.context: Event guild_entry, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The masters of the craft drink together, set prices together, and bury each other’s dead. A seat at their bench costs silver — and buys a future.

event.guild_entry.text.muslim.context: Event guild_entry, text, faith branch muslim.

source.text: The masters of the craft eat together, set prices together, and bury each other’s dead. A seat at their bench costs silver — and buys a future.

event.guild_entry.title.default.context: Event guild_entry, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Guild Bench

event.harsh_winter.options.0.desc.defaul.context: Event harsh_winter, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Warmth given is remembered when the thaw comes.

event.harsh_winter.options.0.label.defau.context: Event harsh_winter, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Share your wood with the neighbors.

event.harsh_winter.options.1.desc.defaul.context: Event harsh_winter, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Charity freezes; family first.

event.harsh_winter.options.1.label.defau.context: Event harsh_winter, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Look to your own hearth.

event.harsh_winter.text.default.context: Event harsh_winter, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The frost comes early and stays like an unwanted guest. Firewood dwindles; the old and the weak begin to die.

event.harsh_winter.title.default.context: Event harsh_winter, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Killing Cold

event.harvest.options.0.desc.default.context: Event harvest, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Sweat now, and winter will tell you what it was worth.

event.harvest.options.0.failure.text.def.context: Event harvest, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A thin, sad yield. Winter will have teeth this year.

event.harvest.options.0.label.default.context: Event harvest, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Bring it in.

event.harvest.options.0.success.text.def.context: Event harvest, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: A fat harvest! Granaries groan, and there is a surplus to sell.

event.harvest.text.default.context: Event harvest, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Scythes hiss in the fields from first light to last. The whole village works, prays, and counts.

event.harvest.title.default.context: Event harvest, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Harvest

event.hawk_with_emir.options.0.desc.defa.context: Event hawk_with_emir, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Charm is safer than glory in a great man’s company.

event.hawk_with_emir.options.0.label.def.context: Event hawk_with_emir, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Ride well, speak better.

event.hawk_with_emir.options.1.desc.defa.context: Event hawk_with_emir, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Outshine the emir and men will talk — including the emir.

event.hawk_with_emir.options.1.failure.t.context: Event hawk_with_emir, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your falcon vanishes over the ridge with your dignity.

event.hawk_with_emir.options.1.label.def.context: Event hawk_with_emir, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Loose your own falcon first.

event.hawk_with_emir.options.1.success.t.context: Event hawk_with_emir, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your bird stoops first and truest. Bold — perhaps too bold. But men saw it.

event.hawk_with_emir.text.default.context: Event hawk_with_emir, text, faith branch default.

source.text: An invitation to ride with {lord} and his falcons — swift horses, gazelle on the plain, and the quiet talk between great men that shapes small futures.

event.hawk_with_emir.title.default.context: Event hawk_with_emir, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Emir’s Hawking

event.heir_question.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event heir_question, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Choose who inherits, before witnesses.

event.heir_question.options.0.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for heir_question, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Settled the succession.

event.heir_question.options.0.label.defa.context: Event heir_question, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Name your heir plainly, now.

event.heir_question.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event heir_question, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Ambition sharpens some heirs and buries others.

event.heir_question.options.1.label.defa.context: Event heir_question, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Let them compete for it.

event.heir_question.options.2.desc.defau.context: Event heir_question, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Death, surely, will make an exception.

event.heir_question.options.2.label.defa.context: Event heir_question, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: “I do not intend to die.”

event.heir_question.text.default.context: Event heir_question, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Your counselors raise it delicately: you will not live forever, and unsettled successions drown realms in blood.

event.heir_question.title.default.context: Event heir_question, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Succession

event.heresy_whiff.options.0.desc.defaul.context: Event heresy_whiff, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Burn the evidence, keep your skin.

event.heresy_whiff.options.0.label.defau.context: Event heresy_whiff, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Burn the page and recant privately.

event.heresy_whiff.options.1.desc.defaul.context: Event heresy_whiff, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Brilliance could vindicate you — or put you barefoot in the snow.

event.heresy_whiff.options.1.failure.tex.context: Event heresy_whiff, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You are made to do public penance, barefoot in the snow.

event.heresy_whiff.options.1.label.defau.context: Event heresy_whiff, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Defend the idea openly.

event.heresy_whiff.options.1.success.tex.context: Event heresy_whiff, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your argument dazzles the examiners; the notion is ruled orthodox after all.

event.heresy_whiff.text.default.context: Event heresy_whiff, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Late study breeds late thoughts. In the margin of an old text you have written something that, read coldly, smells of heresy. Another hand has underlined it.

event.heresy_whiff.title.default.context: Event heresy_whiff, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Dangerous Questions

event.hold_court_event.options.0.desc.de.context: Event hold_court_event, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Wisdom at the bench is remembered in the villages.

event.hold_court_event.options.0.label.d.context: Event hold_court_event, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Judge with care and patience.

event.hold_court_event.options.1.desc.de.context: Event hold_court_event, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Quick judgments are feared more than loved.

event.hold_court_event.options.1.label.d.context: Event hold_court_event, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Judge swiftly and harshly.

event.hold_court_event.options.2.desc.de.context: Event hold_court_event, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Small troubles, small minds — and a small fee.

event.hold_court_event.options.2.label.d.context: Event hold_court_event, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Let the reeve sort it out.

event.hold_court_event.text.default.context: Event hold_court_event, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Court day. Two farmers claim one cow; a widow begs relief of taxes; a merchant accuses your reeve of taking bribes.

event.hold_court_event.title.default.context: Event hold_court_event, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Petitioners at the Gate

event.host_battle.options.0.desc.default.context: Event host_battle, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Renown and ruin stand side by side in the press.

event.host_battle.options.0.failure.text.context: Event host_battle, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A mace finds your helm; your men drag you clear. You bled in the liege’s cause, and that too is remembered.

event.host_battle.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event host_battle, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Fight where the press is thickest.

event.host_battle.options.0.success.text.context: Event host_battle, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your part of the line holds, then breaks them. The liege marks it — and so does everyone else.

event.host_battle.options.1.desc.default.context: Event host_battle, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A quiet day, well held, is remembered too.

event.host_battle.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event host_battle, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Hold your ground and spend your men carefully.

event.host_battle.text.default.context: Event host_battle, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The liege’s war finds its field. Your banner has its place in the line, and great men are watching how you hold it.

event.host_battle.title.default.context: Event host_battle, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Banners Meet

event.host_camp.options.0.desc.default.context: Event host_camp, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Fine words may open doors — or close them.

event.host_camp.options.0.failure.text.d.context: Event host_camp, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You misjudge a jest at a great man’s expense. Cold looks follow you to your tent.

event.host_camp.options.0.label.default.context: Event host_camp, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Talk your house upward.

event.host_camp.options.0.success.text.d.context: Event host_camp, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The right ears, the right words. Doors will open after this war.

event.host_camp.options.1.desc.default.context: Event host_camp, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Sweat now buys blood saved later.

event.host_camp.options.1.label.default.context: Event host_camp, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Drill your men instead.

event.host_camp.options.2.desc.default.context: Event host_camp, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: The war will not wait for you to wake.

event.host_camp.options.2.label.default.context: Event host_camp, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Rest while you can.

event.host_camp.text.default.context: Event host_camp, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A war camp is a court under canvas: lords trade grievances, wagers, and promises between the watch-fires.

event.host_camp.title.default.context: Event host_camp, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Fires of the Great Camp

event.host_discipline.options.0.desc.def.context: Event host_discipline, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Order at the end of a rope.

event.host_discipline.options.0.label.de.context: Event host_discipline, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Hang them before the tents.

event.host_discipline.options.1.desc.def.context: Event host_discipline, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Justice, with mercy and a little silver.

event.host_discipline.options.1.label.de.context: Event host_discipline, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Flog them and repay the woman.

event.host_discipline.options.2.desc.def.context: Event host_discipline, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: The camp remembers what you forgive.

event.host_discipline.options.2.label.de.context: Event host_discipline, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: “Spoils of war.” Look away.

event.host_discipline.text.default.context: Event host_discipline, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Two of your men are dragged before you with a farmwife’s silver in their packs. The camp watches to see what your banner is worth.

event.host_discipline.title.default.context: Event host_discipline, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Plunder in the Baggage

event.house_claim.options.0.desc.default.context: Event house_claim, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Your standing and cunning against their lawyers and pride.

event.house_claim.options.0.failure.effe.context: Durable event log for house_claim, authored option 0, failure.effects.

source.text: The house of {late} shut its doors on {childname}.

event.house_claim.options.0.failure.text.context: Event house_claim, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The house closes ranks. Cold words, a grudging purse, and a door shut on {childname}’s name.

event.house_claim.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event house_claim, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Press {childname}’s claim.

event.house_claim.options.0.success.effe.context: Durable event log for house_claim, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: {childname} was acknowledged by the house of {late}.

event.house_claim.options.0.success.text.context: Event house_claim, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Oaths are read, kin are counted — and the house yields. {childname} is named to the inheritance, and its stewardship falls to your side of the hearth.

event.house_claim.options.1.desc.default.context: Event house_claim, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A fat purse now, and no feud.

event.house_claim.options.1.effects.log..context: Durable event log for house_claim, authored option 1, effects.

source.text: Sold {childname}’s claim on the house of {late}.

event.house_claim.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event house_claim, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Sell the claim back to them.

event.house_claim.options.2.desc.default.context: Event house_claim, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: A quiet childhood is worth more than a lawsuit.

event.house_claim.options.2.effects.log..context: Durable event log for house_claim, authored option 2, effects.

source.text: Let {childname}’s claim on the house of {late} rest.

event.house_claim.options.2.label.defaul.context: Event house_claim, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Let the claim sleep. The child needs no feud.

event.house_claim.text.default.context: Event house_claim, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {late} is dead — and {childname}, your child together, carries the blood of a house that never welcomed you. Now its kin gather to settle the inheritance, and every eye turns to your child.

event.house_claim.title.default.context: Event house_claim, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Blood of the House

event.hunt_with_lord.options.0.desc.defa.context: Event hunt_with_lord, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Charm is safer than glory in a great man’s company.

event.hunt_with_lord.options.0.label.def.context: Event hunt_with_lord, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Ride well, speak better.

event.hunt_with_lord.options.1.desc.defa.context: Event hunt_with_lord, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Steal the lord’s kill and men will talk — including the lord.

event.hunt_with_lord.options.1.failure.t.context: Event hunt_with_lord, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The boar takes exception. You are carried home on a litter.

event.hunt_with_lord.options.1.label.def.context: Event hunt_with_lord, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Take the boar yourself.

event.hunt_with_lord.options.1.success.t.context: Event hunt_with_lord, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your spear takes the boar before the lord’s. Bold — perhaps too bold. But men saw it.

event.hunt_with_lord.text.default.context: Event hunt_with_lord, text, faith branch default.

source.text: An invitation to ride with {lord}’s hunt — hounds, horns, and the talk between great men that shapes small futures.

event.hunt_with_lord.title.default.context: Event hunt_with_lord, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Lord’s Hunt

event.independence_offer.options.0.desc..context: Event independence_offer, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A crown of your own — and a war to keep it.

event.independence_offer.options.0.effec.context: Durable event log for independence_offer, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Declared independence!

event.independence_offer.options.0.label.context: Event independence_offer, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Declare independence!

event.independence_offer.options.1.desc..context: Event independence_offer, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Loyalty proven with other men’s heads.

event.independence_offer.options.1.label.context: Event independence_offer, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Report the plotters to the liege.

event.independence_offer.options.2.desc..context: Event independence_offer, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Treason heard and kept is treason half-owned.

event.independence_offer.options.2.label.context: Event independence_offer, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Say nothing. Remember everything.

event.independence_offer.text.default.context: Event independence_offer, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Discontented lords gather in your hall when the candles burn low. “Why kneel at all?” they murmur. “Your own banner. Your own crown.”

event.independence_offer.title.default.context: Event independence_offer, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Whispers of a Crown

event.iron_shortage.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Dear iron, but the work goes on.

event.iron_shortage.options.0.label.defa.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay the famine price.

event.iron_shortage.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Cheap scrap might pass — until someone looks closely.

event.iron_shortage.options.1.failure.te.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A customer notices. Loudly. In the market.

event.iron_shortage.options.1.label.defa.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Make do with poorer stuff.

event.iron_shortage.options.1.success.te.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Nobody notices the difference. This season, at least.

event.iron_shortage.options.2.desc.defau.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: No work, no scandal, no bread.

event.iron_shortage.options.2.label.defa.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Let the bench stand idle.

event.iron_shortage.text.default.context: Event iron_shortage, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The ore caravans have not come — war or weather, nobody knows. Every smith and joiner in town is bidding for the same scraps.

event.iron_shortage.title.default.context: Event iron_shortage, title, faith branch default.

source.text: No Iron at Any Price

event.item_offer.options.0.desc.default.context: Event item_offer, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Heavy coin for a thing that may outlast you.

event.item_offer.options.0.label.default.context: Event item_offer, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Buy it. ({itemprice} gold)

event.item_offer.options.1.desc.default.context: Event item_offer, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Let some other purse be lightened.

event.item_offer.options.1.label.default.context: Event item_offer, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Too rich for you.

event.item_offer.text.default.context: Event item_offer, text, faith branch default.

source.text: From wrappings of oiled cloth comes {item}. The price is {itemprice} gold — and worth it twice over, says the seller, to the right person.

event.item_offer.title.default.context: Event item_offer, title, faith branch default.

source.text: An Unusual Offer

event.judgment_at_door.options.0.desc.de.context: Event judgment_at_door, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A fair ear could satisfy both — or make one an enemy.

event.judgment_at_door.options.0.failure.context: Event judgment_at_door, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your ruling pleases one house and makes an enemy of the other.

event.judgment_at_door.options.0.label.d.context: Event judgment_at_door, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Hear both sides fully.

event.judgment_at_door.options.0.success.context: Event judgment_at_door, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your judgment threads the needle; both leave grumbling equally — which is to say, satisfied.

event.judgment_at_door.options.1.desc.de.context: Event judgment_at_door, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Pass the thorn uphill, and lose a little grace.

event.judgment_at_door.options.1.label.d.context: Event judgment_at_door, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Send them to the lord’s court.

event.judgment_at_door.text.default.context: Event judgment_at_door, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Two families arrive at the {temple} gate with one dispute, three witnesses, and absolute certainty on both sides. They will take your word as {god}’s.

event.judgment_at_door.title.default.context: Event judgment_at_door, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Two Families, One Gate

event.knighted.options.0.desc.default.context: Event knighted, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: The first step out of the mud. Take it.

event.knighted.options.0.effects.log.def.context: Durable event log for knighted, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Raised to the gentry for valor!

event.knighted.options.0.label.default.context: Event knighted, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Rise, and serve with honor.

event.knighted.text.default.context: Event knighted, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Before the assembled retinue, {lord} bids you kneel. A sword touches your shoulder. When you rise, you are no longer common.

event.knighted.title.default.context: Event knighted, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Raised Up

event.lean_winter.options.0.desc.default.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Silver staves off hunger — at the season’s bitter price.

event.lean_winter.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Buy grain at winter prices.

event.lean_winter.options.1.desc.default.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: The body pays what the purse is spared.

event.lean_winter.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Tighten belts and endure.

event.lean_winter.options.2.desc.default.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Meat in the pot — if the forester looks away.

event.lean_winter.options.2.failure.text.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The forester catches you red-handed over the carcass.

event.lean_winter.options.2.label.defaul.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Poach the lord’s deer.

event.lean_winter.options.2.success.text.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: Venison in the pot, and none the wiser.

event.lean_winter.text.default.context: Event lean_winter, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The grain jar echoes. Your household chews bark-bread and watches the snow.

event.lean_winter.title.default.context: Event lean_winter, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Hungry Months

event.levy_call.options.0.desc.default.context: Event levy_call, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Three weeks’ bread, and whatever the war leaves of you.

event.levy_call.options.0.effects.log.de.context: Durable event log for levy_call, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Marched to war with the levy.

event.levy_call.options.0.label.default.context: Event levy_call, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: March with the levy.

event.levy_call.options.1.desc.default.context: Event levy_call, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Silver buys another man’s courage, and the village’s contempt.

event.levy_call.options.1.label.default.context: Event levy_call, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay a stranger to march in your place.

event.levy_call.options.2.desc.default.context: Event levy_call, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: A hayloft is no fortress if the reeve knows his business.

event.levy_call.options.2.failure.text.d.context: Event levy_call, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Dragged from the hayloft and marched off in a rope collar.

event.levy_call.options.2.label.default.context: Event levy_call, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Hide until the muster passes.

event.levy_call.options.2.success.text.d.context: Event levy_call, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: You dodge the levy — and the war.

event.levy_call.text.default.context: Event levy_call, text, faith branch default.

source.text: War. The reeve reads the summons at the {temple} door: every able man of {province} to muster with spear, shield, and three weeks’ bread.

event.levy_call.title.default.context: Event levy_call, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Levy Is Called

event.liege_appeal.options.0.desc.defaul.context: Event liege_appeal, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A higher lord’s favor — or a letter home.

event.liege_appeal.options.0.failure.tex.context: Event liege_appeal, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: “I do not poach another man’s vassals.” Worse — a letter about your visit rides back to your liege.

event.liege_appeal.options.0.label.defau.context: Event liege_appeal, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Press the appeal.

event.liege_appeal.options.0.success.eff.context: Durable event log for liege_appeal, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Won a higher lord’s favor.

event.liege_appeal.options.0.success.tex.context: Event liege_appeal, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The high lord strokes his beard. “No good sword should rust under a small master.” He takes your oath himself.

event.liege_appeal.options.1.desc.defaul.context: Event liege_appeal, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Some doors are better left unknocked.

event.liege_appeal.options.1.label.defau.context: Event liege_appeal, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Think better of it, and withdraw.

event.liege_appeal.text.default.context: Event liege_appeal, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You kneel before {rulername} of {rname} and lay out your suit: your own lord is unjust, you say, and you would serve a worthier hand — his.

event.liege_appeal.title.default.context: Event liege_appeal, title, faith branch default.

source.text: An Appeal Above Your Liege

event.liege_summons.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event liege_summons, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Join the liege’s host for the length of the war.

event.liege_summons.options.0.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for liege_summons, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Rode to the liege’s war.

event.liege_summons.options.0.label.defa.context: Event liege_summons, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Ride to the muster.

event.liege_summons.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event liege_summons, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Silver marches for you, and is noted.

event.liege_summons.options.1.label.defa.context: Event liege_summons, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Send gold in your stead.

event.liege_summons.options.2.desc.defau.context: Event liege_summons, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: A lord forgives many things — absence is not one.

event.liege_summons.options.2.label.defa.context: Event liege_summons, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Ignore the summons.

event.liege_summons.text.default.context: Event liege_summons, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A herald in your liege’s colors: war is declared, and your banner is called to muster with all your strength.

event.liege_summons.title.default.context: Event liege_summons, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Liege’s Banner Call

event.liege_tax.options.0.desc.default.context: Event liege_tax, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Coin spent now buys quiet favor later.

event.liege_tax.options.0.label.default.context: Event liege_tax, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay without a murmur. (12 gold)

event.liege_tax.options.1.desc.default.context: Event liege_tax, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A short purse, politely explained.

event.liege_tax.options.1.label.default.context: Event liege_tax, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Send a third, with apologies.

event.liege_tax.options.2.desc.default.context: Event liege_tax, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Defiance is cheap until the tally comes due.

event.liege_tax.options.2.label.default.context: Event liege_tax, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Refuse outright.

event.liege_tax.text.default.context: Event liege_tax, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Collectors arrive from {liege} with tallies and wax: the lord calls an extraordinary aid upon all his vassals — your chest included.

event.liege_tax.title.default.context: Event liege_tax, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Liege’s Aid

event.liege_war_ends.options.0.desc.defa.context: Event liege_war_ends, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: The road home, with honor in your saddlebags.

event.liege_war_ends.options.0.effects.l.context: Durable event log for liege_war_ends, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Came home from the liege’s war.

event.liege_war_ends.options.0.label.def.context: Event liege_war_ends, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Home, to what waited.

event.liege_war_ends.text.default.context: Event liege_war_ends, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The liege’s war is done. The great camp folds tent by tent, and the banners turn for home — yours among them, with honor.

event.liege_war_ends.title.default.context: Event liege_war_ends, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Host Disbands

event.loot_temptation.options.0.desc.def.context: Event loot_temptation, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Honest plunder, if plunder can be honest.

event.loot_temptation.options.0.label.de.context: Event loot_temptation, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Take your share of houses — not the {temple}.

event.loot_temptation.options.1.desc.def.context: Event loot_temptation, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Rich pickings, with {god} watching.

event.loot_temptation.options.1.label.de.context: Event loot_temptation, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Strip the {temple} too.

event.loot_temptation.options.2.desc.def.context: Event loot_temptation, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: No gold in it, but the priests will remember.

event.loot_temptation.options.2.label.de.context: Event loot_temptation, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Guard the {temple} door.

event.loot_temptation.text.default.context: Event loot_temptation, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The town has fallen and discipline with it. Doors splinter; men stagger past with armfuls of plate and cloth. The {temple} stands unguarded.

event.loot_temptation.title.default.context: Event loot_temptation, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Sacked Town

event.lord_covets_horse.options.0.desc.d.context: Event lord_covets_horse, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Generosity the powerful remember.

event.lord_covets_horse.options.0.label..context: Event lord_covets_horse, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Offer it as a gift.

event.lord_covets_horse.options.1.desc.d.context: Event lord_covets_horse, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Stand your ground and pray he admires it.

event.lord_covets_horse.options.1.failur.context: Event lord_covets_horse, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Days later the horse is “requisitioned for the levy.” You are paid a tenth of its worth.

event.lord_covets_horse.options.1.label..context: Event lord_covets_horse, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: “Bred and paid for, lord.”

event.lord_covets_horse.options.1.succes.context: Event lord_covets_horse, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: He grunts, half insulted and half impressed, and rides on.

event.lord_covets_horse.text.default.context: Event lord_covets_horse, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {lord} reins in beside your warhorse and looks it over far too long. “A fine beast,” he says, “for a common man.”

event.lord_covets_horse.title.default.context: Event lord_covets_horse, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Lord’s Long Look

event.lord_squeezes.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event lord_squeezes, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Coin today, and the tally-man moves on.

event.lord_squeezes.options.0.label.defa.context: Event lord_squeezes, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay without a word. (4 gold)

event.lord_squeezes.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event lord_squeezes, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: The back pays what the purse is spared.

event.lord_squeezes.options.1.label.defa.context: Event lord_squeezes, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Work the extra days instead.

event.lord_squeezes.options.2.desc.defau.context: Event lord_squeezes, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Right may be on your side — the ledger is on his.

event.lord_squeezes.options.2.failure.te.context: Event lord_squeezes, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: “Custom is what the lord says it is.” The tally stands — and there is a fine for arguing.

event.lord_squeezes.options.2.label.defa.context: Event lord_squeezes, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Appeal to the old custom.

event.lord_squeezes.options.2.success.te.context: Event lord_squeezes, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: You name the custom and the witnesses to it. The reeve scratches out the line, scowling.

event.lord_squeezes.text.default.context: Event lord_squeezes, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The reeve arrives with a new tally, and your name sits at the top of it — extra boon-days, and a “customary” gift no one else is asked to pay. {lord}’s dislike has found its way into the ledger.

event.lord_squeezes.title.default.context: Event lord_squeezes, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Tally With Your Name On It

event.lords_notice.options.0.desc.defaul.context: Event lords_notice, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Speak the dream aloud and see what it costs.

event.lords_notice.options.0.effects.log.context: Durable event log for lords_notice, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: The lord spoke of freedom.

event.lords_notice.options.0.label.defau.context: Event lords_notice, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: “My freedom, lord, if I earn it.”

event.lords_notice.options.1.desc.defaul.context: Event lords_notice, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Humility pleases the powerful, and asks for nothing.

event.lords_notice.options.1.label.defau.context: Event lords_notice, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: “Only to serve, lord.”

event.lords_notice.options.2.desc.defaul.context: Event lords_notice, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: An honest ambition, honestly confessed.

event.lords_notice.options.2.label.defau.context: Event lords_notice, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: “Land of my own, someday.”

event.lords_notice.text.default.context: Event lords_notice, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {lord} reins in beside your strip of field. “You. You’re the one who works like two men. What is it you want in this life?”

event.lords_notice.title.default.context: Event lords_notice, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Lord’s Eye

event.made_abbot.options.0.desc.default.context: Event made_abbot, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: The brothers may raise you — or close ranks against you.

event.made_abbot.options.0.failure.text..context: Event made_abbot, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The prior’s faction outvotes yours. You remain a brother among brothers.

event.made_abbot.options.0.label.default.context: Event made_abbot, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Accept the burden.

event.made_abbot.options.0.success.effec.context: Durable event log for made_abbot, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Elected abbot!

event.made_abbot.options.0.success.text..context: Event made_abbot, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The house is yours to rule — lands, tithes, and souls.

event.made_abbot.options.1.desc.default.context: Event made_abbot, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Piety grows fastest out of office.

event.made_abbot.options.1.label.default.context: Event made_abbot, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Decline in humility.

event.made_abbot.text.default.context: Event made_abbot, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The old abbot has gone to his reward. The brothers gather to choose a successor, and many eyes turn to you.

event.made_abbot.title.default.context: Event made_abbot, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Abbot’s Chair

event.made_qadi.options.0.desc.default.context: Event made_qadi, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: The seat could be yours, if the notables agree.
