source.text: What the House Owes

event.winter_fever.options.0.desc.defaul.context: Event winter_fever, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Give the sickness a warm bed and time.

event.winter_fever.options.0.effects.log.context: Durable event log for winter_fever, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Took ill over winter.

event.winter_fever.options.0.label.defau.context: Event winter_fever, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Rest and broth.

event.winter_fever.options.1.desc.defaul.context: Event winter_fever, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Sweat it out — or let it dig its claws in.

event.winter_fever.options.1.failure.tex.context: Event winter_fever, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You collapse. The sickness digs deep.

event.winter_fever.options.1.label.defau.context: Event winter_fever, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Work through it.

event.winter_fever.options.1.success.tex.context: Event winter_fever, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: You sweat it out at your labors.

event.winter_fever.text.default.context: Event winter_fever, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A wet cough settles in your chest as the cold bites. Half the village is abed with it.

event.winter_fever.title.default.context: Event winter_fever, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Coughing Sickness

event.wolves.options.0.desc.default.context: Event wolves, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A pelt and a name — or a scar to carry home.

event.wolves.options.0.failure.text.defa.context: Event wolves, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The wolf leaves you a scar to remember it by.

event.wolves.options.0.label.default.context: Event wolves, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Hunt the beast.

event.wolves.options.0.success.text.defa.context: Event wolves, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: You come home dragging a grey carcass. The village drinks your health.

event.wolves.options.0.success.text.musl.context: Event wolves, authored option 0, success text, branch muslim.

source.text: You come home dragging a grey carcass. The village feasts you as a hero.

event.wolves.options.1.desc.default.context: Event wolves, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: The wolf eats what patience costs.

event.wolves.options.1.label.default.context: Event wolves, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Pen the flock and wait for spring.

event.wolves.text.default.context: Event wolves, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Tracks in the snow, big as your palm. Something has been at the sheep, and the dogs whine at dusk.

event.wolves.title.default.context: Event wolves, title, faith branch default.

source.text: Wolves at the Fold

event.words_before_dawn.options.0.desc.d.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A dying man’s will, carried in your skull.

event.words_before_dawn.options.0.failur.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: By dawn, three vital words have three possible meanings.

event.words_before_dawn.options.0.label..context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Commit every word to memory.

event.words_before_dawn.options.0.succes.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The phrasing fixes itself in your mind as if written there.

event.words_before_dawn.options.1.desc.d.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: More ears, less argument — if they arrive in time.

event.words_before_dawn.options.1.failur.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: One arrives too late; the other is kin to the expected claimant.

event.words_before_dawn.options.1.label..context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Gather two more witnesses.

event.words_before_dawn.options.1.succes.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Three households hear the same words and agree upon them.

event.words_before_dawn.options.2.desc.d.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Count it before someone’s cousin does.

event.words_before_dawn.options.2.failur.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A chest is already open and nobody admits touching it.

event.words_before_dawn.options.2.label..context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Inventory and seal the goods.

event.words_before_dawn.options.2.succes.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: Every tool and animal is counted before anyone can spirit it away.

event.words_before_dawn.options.3.desc.d.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 3, desc, branch default.

source.text: A little bend in the truth, for ready coin.

event.words_before_dawn.options.3.failur.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 3, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The offer was a test. Your reputation reaches the door before you do.

event.words_before_dawn.options.3.label..context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Shade the wording for a promised fee.

event.words_before_dawn.options.3.succes.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 3, success text, branch default.

source.text: The favored claimant presses three coins into your hand.

event.words_before_dawn.options.4.desc.d.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 4, desc, branch default.

source.text: Another man’s will is another man’s burden.

event.words_before_dawn.options.4.label..context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 4, label, branch default.

source.text: Refuse the responsibility.

event.words_before_dawn.text.default.context: Event words_before_dawn, text, faith branch default.

legend.condition.default.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Lived. Died. The chronicle splits the difference.

legend.condition.early.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Gone before their time; the time was never consulted.

legend.condition.emperor.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Ruled an empire; the empire has been formally notified.

legend.condition.famous.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: So famous that strangers are mourning professionally.

legend.condition.many_children.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Leaves {count} children and not one quiet meal behind.

legend.condition.no_children.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Leaves no children; the gossips needed no invitation.

legend.condition.old.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Died full of years and of opinions about the young.

legend.condition.poor.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Died owing a goat. The goat has not forgotten.

legend.condition.rich.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Died rich. The coffers were pried from still-warm fingers.

legend.condition.serf.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Born a serf, died a serf, and outstubborned everyone in between.

legend.condition.sickness.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Complained about the leech bill until the very end.

legend.condition.very_old.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Reached {age}, an age the neighbors called showing off.

legend.condition.young.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Gone at {age}; the chronicle leaves most of the page blank.

legend.death.age.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

cases.early: {name} dies in {year} AD, aged {age} — before their time.
cases.old: {name} dies in {year} AD, aged {age} — full of years.
cases.other: {name} dies in {year} AD, aged {age}.
cases.sickness: {name} dies in {year} AD, aged {age} — taken by sickness.

legend.death.wounds.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Wounds and sickness prove too much. {name} does not see another season.

legend.skill.dip.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Could talk a beggar into lending money, and did.

legend.skill.int.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Knew everyone’s secrets and took the best ones along.

legend.skill.lea.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Read more books than the parish owned.

legend.skill.mar.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Settled most disputes by winning them.

legend.skill.ste.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Counted everything. The graveyard steward sends regards.

legend.trait.ambitious.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Wanted more. Got a grave, which is technically more.

legend.trait.brave.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Never once ran. Running would have helped, but still.

legend.trait.chaste.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Pure to the end, and faintly smug about it.

legend.trait.comely.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: The fairest burial the parish has managed in years.

legend.trait.content.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Wanted nothing, received exactly that, and was pleased.

legend.trait.craven.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Attended every battle from the safety of the rear.

legend.trait.cruel.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Feared in life; the mourning is largely procedural.

legend.trait.cynical.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Expected nothing of the afterlife and declines to be surprised.

legend.trait.deceitful.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Died insisting they felt perfectly fine.

legend.trait.drunkard.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: The cup won in the end, exactly as the cup predicted.

legend.trait.dull.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Untroubled by thought; slipped away in the absence of one.

legend.trait.excommunicated.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Buried at a crossroads by popular ecclesiastical demand.

legend.trait.frail.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Fragile in body, punctual in the end.

legend.trait.generous.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Gave away everything except the debts.

legend.trait.genius.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Knew everything except how to stay.

legend.trait.gluttonous.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Out-ate every harvest set before them, and several that were not.

legend.trait.greedy.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Left instructions about the gold. Nobody can find them.

legend.trait.homely.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: A face only a mother could love, and she kept her counsel.

legend.trait.honest.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Never told a lie. The family found this exhausting.

legend.trait.humble.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Asked for a plain funeral and was, for once, obeyed.

legend.trait.kind.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Genuinely mourned, which surprised no one more than them.

legend.trait.kinslayer.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: The family attended the grave at a careful distance.

legend.trait.literate.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Read everything in reach, including, twice, a menu.

legend.trait.lustful.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Mourned by more households than the family admits.

legend.trait.maimed.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Broken in body, never once in complaint.

legend.trait.one_eyed.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Lost an eye, gained a story, told it ten thousand times.

legend.trait.patient.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Waited for everything. Waited for this, too.

legend.trait.pilgrim.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Walked the holy roads; took the last one without luggage.

legend.trait.proud.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Bowed to no one. The grave accepts all bows as given.

legend.trait.quick.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Quick of wit, and quicker to mention it.

legend.trait.robust.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Never ill a day. The last day declined to comment.

legend.trait.scarred.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Wore their scars like debts others owed. All settled now.

legend.trait.sickly.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: So often ill that the end registered as a scheduling change.

legend.trait.strong.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Could lift an ox. The ox sends no condolences.

legend.trait.temperate.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Moderate in all things, including, at the last, breathing.

legend.trait.veteran.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Survived the shield-wall. The years fought sneakier.

legend.trait.wrathful.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Died angry. The wake was quieter than the life.

legend.trait.zealous.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Corrected priests on doctrine; has presumably gone to check.

news.action.alms.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: 🕯 Gave alms to the poor.

news.action.barony_refused.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: The lord smiles, promises nothing, and speaks of the weather.

news.action.brotherhood.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Swore an oath of brotherhood.

news.action.building_raised.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: 🏗 {building} rises in {province}.

news.action.county_bought.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: 💰 {province} is yours for {gold} gold — its old lord retires fat and forgotten. The court frowns on bought land.

news.action.county_granted.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: 🎁 {province} is granted to a loyal man — {name} holds it in your name.

news.action.county_purchase_record.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Bought {province} from its struggling lord.

news.action.duchy_granted.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: 🎁 The Duchy of {duchy} is granted to {name} — {count} counties held in your name.

news.action.envoy_failure.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: 🕊 The envoy returns, gifts refused. {realm} is unmoved.

Sawdust, burns, and a trade worth silver. Guilds and town councils are ladders for those who can climb.
★★★★ hard
You are {name}, apprenticed to a master of the craft in {province}. Your hands are learning what your purse will someday know.

A drafty tower, a hundred spears, and a liege watching your loyalty. The traditional start.
★ classic
You are {name}, Baron in {province}, sworn to {realm}. Your tower is small and your ambitions are welcome to be otherwise.
Petty Baron
A small plot, a strong back, and your own name in the rolls. Freedom is a start — now make it into wealth.
★★★★ hard
You are {name}, a free farmer of {province}. Your land is small, your debts are few, and your ambitions need not be.
Free Farmer
Gentle blood, empty purse. A horse, a blade, and admittance to halls where futures are granted.
★★ fair
